name: Trump News HQ
subject: Why are Bezos and Musk Investing Billions to ‘Transform’ the American Economy?
body:
Something strange is happening behind the scenes in our financial system.

| **Why are Bezos and Musk Investing Billions to ‘Transform’ the American Economy? And What Does It Mean for Your Money?** Something strange is happening behind the scenes in our financial system. Right now, the mainstream media is completely ignoring what might be the most important story in the financial world that nobody is talking about. Amid the distractions caused by conflicts overseas, shortages, and inflation, Treasury Secretary Janet Yellen recently took the stage at an event called COP26 in Glasgow, Scotland to address some of the world’s most powerful people, including:
* U.S. President, Joe Biden...
* British Prime Minister, Boris Johnson...
* Canadian Prime Minister, Justin Trudeau...
* French President, Emmanuel Macron...
* ... and many more...
From the stage, Yellen called for world leaders to commit to a [$150 trillion ‘global transition’ of our economy.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zr6f5mqcilm76b41e73ai41bujnimvji588s40do_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s3h68oj2c3h2bs) Since then, Bank of America has committed, along with 131 countries, 234 cities, and 695 of the world’s biggest companies. Several billionaires, led by Jeff Bezos and Elon Musk have invested in this ‘transformation’ as well. What is it that Yellen, Biden, Trudeau, Bezos and Musk are pushing for with their ‘transformation’? And what does it mean for your money? Investigative journalist and renowned economist, Nomi Prins, who predicted the 2008 market meltdown has followed the money... And what she’s discovered is startling. It has nothing to do with a market crash... a new reserve currency... or the end of fiat. Prins says: **“While most Americans are distracted by mainstream media headlines, I’ve found evidence the elites are spending $150 trillion to ‘transform’ our economy into something we didn’t vote on... didn’t ask for... and very few are prepared for.** **In essence, we’re about to see a stranger, more extreme ‘new normal’ in America.** **Most people will be shocked when they see what happens in the months ahead.”** Prins considers this transformation so urgent, she has agreed to sit down for an interview to get her message in front of as many Americans as possible. For now, there’s no cost to watch. [Go here to see how this ‘transformation’ could affect you – and find out what it means for your money.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zh2sah4c2qh2qh63hfiu4a7mjrvk22fdg0nkfhi0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s3h68oj2c3h2bs) [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z8t7o56i2ijd3fon06tv06fmmsl8s3945n67bqv0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s3h68oj2c3h2bs)
---

Trump Train News

For now, there’s no cost to watch. American Update 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Rand Paul
subject: Taking the fight to corrupt teachers unions
body:
Socialists are teaching your children to hate America.

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zcghto82rrm7oj0h05liumekmqn7vo55836a5t18_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s3h62o77chh2bs)
Friend,

Socialists are teaching your children to hate America.

They have taken over classrooms and indoctrinated hundreds of thousands of students with Critical Race Theory. They would rather focus lessons on pronouns and gender identity than teach trade skills, science, or basic math.

_It 's no wonder our kids have developed the highest levels of anxiety and depression in the world._

I'd like to introduce you to an organization that is leading the fight to take back our school boards from the radical Left and protect our children, **Parents Union of America (PUOA).**

I just talked with Jessi Melton, President of PUOA, and told her that I would reach out to my supporters and help raise $15,000 this week to fund their efforts.

[_**Friend, can I count on you to share my support for PUOA? Click here to donate $10, $25, $50, or any amount today >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5rap38jfhfk9an7kdi6n07q06n6u9cuf107cfuo_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s3h62o77chh2bs)

I want to share a message from PUOA:

_**" We stand as a counter-offensive **__**against the powerful, agenda-driven Teachers ' Union**_ _**, which has systematically sought to destroy wholesome American values and indoctrinate our children. "**_

_Parents Union of America is the ANTI teachers-union_.

Their mission is to target the most populous school districts and remove the incompetent school board members put in place by the Anti-American, corrupt Teachers' Union.

**I, for one, am sick and tired of socialists indoctrinating our children. And the corrupt Teacher Unions are to blame.**

We can't allow the same people who turn a blind eye to inappropriate textbook material and socialist indoctrination to remain in charge of American schools.

[_**Will you join the fight to save America 's schools from the corrupt Teacher's Union? Please send your urgent donation NOW >>> **_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z52i2fgnlph33vrp2u8c3mdds5fvdumeb9g6v5e0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s3h62o77chh2bs)

PUOA does more than fight to remove corrupt school board members. They work to fill school boards with America-First candidates and parents.

They plan to replace corrupt school board members with America-First candidates. They recruit and train conservative candidates and raise money to get them elected. These candidates MUST display the ability and willingness to fight for conservative values by going on the offensive.

**Parents Union of America refuses to stay on the defensive when our children are involved. **

I know this is a lot to ask, but can you help me keep my promise to raise $15,000 this week for Parents Union of America?

** Click below to send your gift.**
[_**Donate $10**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z59tcldsc6got0ojas9kg2rpopvchsnlid54l5kg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s3h62o77chh2bs)
[_**Donate $25**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zcq61ck2an5cje7r74csklraguh62on562begq58_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s3h62o77chh2bs)
[_**Donate $50**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqs3shgi8u7hopg3m7gf0c6tn0fj8i0qju74t688_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s3h62o77chh2bs)
[_**Donate $100**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zdutmcn043rbhj4lcs317uh5o09dl8m1dbmnucbg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s3h62o77chh2bs)
[_**Donate $250**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0lks9a8agabgh5qo30v66imr04ldas6urqls8lg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s3h62o77chh2bs)
[_**Donate $500**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zm0osp72mgudtliakjv5b79brv7oncgo8ftc2mlo_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s3h62o77chh2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0hgtg5pg6uptk08coop76ph7qsm9m3blqi4t2jo_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s3h62o77chh2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z29d0vqprree6k2pp817e608sri97ignoi7iqc78_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s3h62o77chh2bs)

Thank you,

Senator Rand Paul

name: Deroy Murdock
subject: Silicon Valley, Signature Banks’ Collapse— Could your bank be next?
body:
Silicon Valley Bank was the second-largest bank collapse in history.

| Dear Reader, Silicon Valley Bank was the second-largest bank collapse in history. Second only to Washington Mutual when it went under in 2008. Then Signature Bank of NY was taken over by regulators Making it the second massive bank failure in 3 days. [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zn1u94gjgvc06h0j5h6i0tm77ng4jbb4b3gqps00_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s3h62o77c5h2bs) These events beg the question: Is your bank safe? Is your money safe? With all that's been going on, former Goldman Sachs executive Dr. Nomi Prins used to think a crash was inevitable. One that could wipe out the savings of investors, seniors and retirees. She still believes there is going to be an economic crisis. Just not the kind of crisis most people expect. **[Read the full story here.](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z18n7jam6pp6ejmbavhc6tiunfnkjtrdrgmptqrg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s3h62o77c5h2bs)** Regards, Maria Bonaventura Senior Managing Editor, _Rogue Economics_ **P.S.** We're on the brink of the greatest transfer of wealth in American history. name: 1600 Daily
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

| | | This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zf38ls36e4g2olij9p71fq70re3mujke881ud2b0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s3h66or1cth2bs)
| |
Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection **by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zn3a4hum2k9c6tgh887np87bcvtbg1k3b8ovrgr8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s3h66or1cth2bs)**
## Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?
[YES](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z4d95ma9v7g2cnh4ctqaip5vl05ur8j3nhtgk41g_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s3h66or1cth2bs) [NO](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zrd2qmfho48l18vdltssvhf4hbte55u8nr80n558_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s3h66or1cth2bs) For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zdhjug2hu61mj2imu051tr28jepqh8ragrdlabvg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s3h66or1cth2bs)**
** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

1600 Daily
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z2stmv3h1ijlt1ob133l6c5h9p5aknoukfuotfk8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjkhhm0o316gqb3d7jkorrbdt5eer7ashmeop79chl6ujuadf161rn9cdhmir76pr02sqr8d5hmej3fddj4iqu8o37c9jm6pr246h22sh2s8i66pr4s3h66or1cth2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z5vvo41b1am9bv96k3605d2bml5atj8rmethviv8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s3h66or1cth2bs)_

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zjdu7ogjjnkn1memt8k6uomnhu2m3sveaf0g66k8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s3h66or1cth238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: Your America
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

| | This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c02356%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=4xH5RVYFswQcHfIIoUR7dg&sysid=1) |
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection **by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c02357%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=wgINgal4P0MlzqI%2fyT6W3w&sysid=1)**
## Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?
[YES](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c02358%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=xwyDhuz%2fts3gsKyvN5wBfA&sysid=1) [NO](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c02359%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=EzPX5X8%2fXR6K4LA2d9MO6w&sysid=1) For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale’s American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c02357%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=wgINgal4P0MlzqI%2fyT6W3w&sysid=1)**
** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Your America News
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

name: Ron Johnson
subject: Rock bottom.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron Johnson For Senate, Inc
body:
We ran out of money and barely made it over the finish line.

| |
---
| | | Friend,

The ugly truth is my campaign hit rock bottom.

We ran out of money and barely made it over the finish line.

The only reason we won was the support of brave patriots like you.

After getting hit with massive attacks funded by the Democrats' dark money, we unfortunately had to take on some campaign debt to survive.

And now, _**[we need help to retire our campaign debt.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zqg32a8b3bl3mprmo9rd8krhrpsdbql3o4ftlihg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s3h61ob6cdh2bs "we need help to retire our campaign debt.")**_

Friend, I hate to ask this, but it has to be done.

_**[Will you help us pay off this debt? Even $5 will be helpful.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z7s2tr7h4i5i5qbmdqnnacms9vcrnvbd5bs40dd0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s3h61ob6cdh2bs "Will you help us pay off this debt? Even $5 will be helpful.")**_

The sooner we can retire this debt, the faster we can turn our attention to beating the Democrats again in 2024.

Thank you,

Ron Johnson

---
| | [CHIP IN TO PAY DOWN DEBT >>](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zpoohofd85mrbnjr5ik32dm9c3obq0r3io6u1l30_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s3h61ob6cdh2bs "CHIP IN TO PAY DOWN DEBT")
---

PS - I'm a man of my word. My promise to you is that I will always tell the truth and fight for you, your family and for America. **_[Will you help me keep going?](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zhik4vthoptkng3gdpbp2c4bs7dj4pl6db6u80f0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s3h61ob6cdh2bs "Will you help me keep going?")_**

---
| |
* * *
---
| [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zl6u29jetic6a719hd0ctubv51h95u8mthls731g_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s3h61ob6cdh2bs "CHIP IN NOW")
---
---

Friend, thanks to you I survived a bruising campaign battle with the Left.

But winning took everything I had, and more. I took on some campaign debt, and now it's time to pay it off.

I hate to ask this, but **_[will you help me finally see this campaign through to the end](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zfb7fav31ktsbbbobdu9v2tspb2gqp745srbbrl0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s3h61ob6cdh2bs "will you help me finally see this campaign through to the end")_** so I can double down on our Conservative efforts in the Senate?

Any amount you can contribute will be helpful. Your help is greatly appreciated.

Thank you,
Ron Johnson
---
| | [CHIP IN TO RETIRE DEBT >>](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zimm8602a43rf893iop42016045g6a2i7v7l2j58_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s3h61ob6cdh2bs "CHIP IN TO RETIRE DEBT")

body:

| |

This is NOT a threat to be taken lightly. DC is a FAR LEFT stronghold. Should it become a state, it would PERMANENTLY give Democrats two more far left Senators that they could use to transform America BEYOND RECOGNITION.

The Democrats are in FULL CONTROL of the Senate and the White House. Chuck Schumer wants this to happen. Joe Biden wants this to happen.

A Republican House is the LAST line of defense.

Democrats know they can't win with standard tactics so they're making a power play by trying to flip the game board to their advantage!

It is IMPERATIVE that we stop this radical power grab right here and now. If the Dems get away with this, NOTHING. ELSE. MATTERS.

**[Will you join your fellow patriots and House Republicans in taking a stand against DC Statehood and this blatant Dem scheme for power?](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zghkvqp1t9demsjfdoditqnuqeiobpi2nb16ptd8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s3h61ob6cjh2bs "Will you join your fellow patriots and House Republicans in taking a stand against DC Statehood and this blatant Dem scheme for power?")**

name: Speaker McCarthy
subject: Should I put you down for option 1 or option 2?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
| |
---
| | | **State of the Union 2023: Biden re-ups amnesty call for illegal immigrants, GOP reps yell 'secure the border'**
**_FOX NEWS_**
Biden just renewed his push for mass amnesty of millions of illegal immigrants - including the more than 5 MILLION he's ushered in under his administration.

As Speaker of the House, I need to know. Where do you stand on Biden's Mass-Amnesty plan?
**Option 1: We surrender to Biden 's Open-Borders agenda, and allow him to legalize millions of illegal immigrants.**

---
| | [OPTION 1](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62478737:JPvLQ9GNG:m:1:3391001263:36953E245D730F71C8B085B470AD86B2:r)
---

**Option 2: We stand strong against Open-Borders Biden, and SECURE the border once and for all!**

Should I put you down for Option 1 or Option 2?

I know where I stand: as long as I am Speaker of the House, there will be _NO_ amnesty for illegal immigrants. **[Are you with me?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62478737:JPvLQ9GNG:m:1:3391001263:36953E245D730F71C8B085B470AD86B2:r "Are you with me?")** I need you to make your decision ASAP. I hope to see your name among my list of Pro-Border patriots.

---

Thank you for your time and patriotic support,

name: American Action News
subject: The Genesis Story Online Course Now on DVD
body:
I hope you’re having a good day. I’m writing with some exciting news.

This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zgvbvu67huoh6bni2jd5dj5dqgt13d4restfooj8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s3h62o77chh2bs) Dear Fellow American,

I hope you’re having a good day. I’m writing with some exciting news.

Hillsdale College’s popular online course, **“The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical Narratives,”** is available on DVD.

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zj3gc7so37tv025ms5bdf05g7lnbumdut13llv6o_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s3h62o77chh2bs)In this six-lecture course, you’ll explore some of the major themes of Genesis, including the complex relationship between God and man, and what it reveals about divine and human nature.

“The Genesis Story” is taught by Hillsdale College professor of English Justin Jackson, who has taught the subject to undergraduate students here at the College for 15 years. This course aims to deepen a student’s theological understanding of the Old Testament by revealing the literary beauty and complexity of the text.

The course begins with a lecture and introduction by the President of Hillsdale College, Dr. Larry P. Arnn, in which he explains why we teach the Book of Genesis at Hillsdale College and why it’s important to both faith and higher education.

Then, Dr. Jackson explains the four relationships that dominate the Book of Genesis: God and creation, God and man, man and man, and man and creation.

These relationships are explored in the narratives of Adam and Eve, Abraham and Sarah, Abraham and Isaac, Jacob and Esau, and finally, Joseph.

This course on DVD is perfect for viewing in your home with your family or for use in small groups such as Bible studies and book clubs.

**For your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of Hillsdale College, you’ll receive the DVD as our thank you.**

To receive your Genesis DVD box set or to give it as a gift, please use the secure link here: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-genesis](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3flg4uc279i2chkp55b1cpipbggnlnpkjpv7918_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s3h62o77chh2bs)**

As you know, Hillsdale College refuses EVERY PENNY of state and federal government funding—even indirectly through student loans and grants. That’s why your support is so crucial.

Your gift helps expand Hillsdale College’s national educational outreach efforts to educate millions of Americans nationwide, including our nation’s youth. Your gift will also help to:
* Increase the number of students taking free online courses, such as “Genesis.”
* Expand the readership of _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s digest of liberty.
* Establish and guide classical K-12 schools nationwide and provide, free of charge, Hillsdale’s American classical K-12 curriculum to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.
* Promote the principles of American constitutionalism through social media and the radio.

Friend, please use the secure link above to make a $100 contribution in support of Hillsdale’s educational outreach, and explore the beauty of the first book of the Bible with your new DVD set of **“The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical Narratives.”**

Warm regards,

Bill Gray
Class of 2001
Vice President
National Donor Outreach
Hillsdale College
---

American Action News
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8ov6omv4u6ij6nnjt3slit6kn6ol54s2lte7aog_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s3h62o77chh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnklprctbi6pr34t5i6krqfp9ls4o7et5hm6qbcsr7c0bjbd1km6pqcdtlmcibbp30cth6epb7c8iv0)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqqdra94sdvdc3j0s7v3cshs2n8ns5i4u0k0dcqg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s3h62o77chh2bs)_

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9ktnqu3gi98nr18omgu3p57p2theni744bh60no_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s3h62o77chh238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: 4Patriots
subject: The Food Crisis of 2023
body:
We live in uncertain times.

# The Food Crisis of 2023
We live in uncertain times. There are currently 38 million Americans, including 12 million children, who are struggling with food insecurity. As inflation and supply chain disruptions continue to push food costs higher and higher, families are feeling the weight of financial distress as they struggle to make ends meet. John Boyd Jr., a fourth-generation farmer, warns that food shortages are coming. "For so long, we've enjoyed lots of food in this country, so we've never ever faced a food shortage. The worst is yet to come." **Leading industry sources are worried about food shortages. Experts say more grocery hoarding may come as disruptions push America's food supply "near its breaking point".** As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever. If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to be hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

Well, no need to worry anymore... Obviously, waiting on the government for a handout in a disaster just isn't an option. And we were completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of the best-selling [**4Patriots Survival Food Kits**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c653203%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=MbaZ1LkJtYu4iEpm%2bVejdg&sysid=1). Currently the 4Patriots Survival Food Kits are flying off the shelves because:
* **4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value.** This is _not_ ordinary food. This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that helps keep you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high-quality survival food without gross fillers or weird "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are handpacked right in a family-owned facility in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are.
* There's no fancy packaging, it's sturdy, triple-layer stuff and can stand up to most of the crazy things that happen in a crisis. This food **is designed to last for 25 years** , so you have complete peace of mind for the long term. And they're using compact kits so you can store them anywhere in your house without any extra hassle. They're sturdy, water-resistant and stack easily. And extremely covert too.
* You can make these meals in less than 20 minutes. Just add boiling water, simmer, and serve.
* **Customers rave about the delicious flavor of this food - it doesn't taste like "survival food."** And you get a whole slew of choices for breakfast, lunch and dinner so you don't get stuck eating the same thing day-in and day-out.
* **You get an easy, no nonsense monthly payment plan with no interest!**

And that's not all, because... [**You also get $318 worth of FREE gifts!**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c653204%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=IJVES9dI5GFawvWTXwrklA&sysid=1) **FREE Bonus #1:** because they are so popular and a true foundation for your preparedness plan, they're going to give you _**2**_ of their popular 72-Hour Survival Food Kits when you get your 3-Month Kit today. That's extra meals (on the house), grab-and-go portability and a way to get through a short-term crisis without even breaking into your stash. **People love these kits.** It's one of the top-rated items on our website. And you get... **FREE Bonus #2:** You'll get a **Victory Garden Survival Seed Vault** with thousands of non-GMO heirloom seeds inside, designed to stay fresh for years. You can harvest and replant them over and over again. **FREE Bonus #3:** You also get their **Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater.** With your Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater, you can boil water without fuel, flames, smoke or noise. Use your Sun Kettle to purify water, cook food, wash up, clean up and much more. It's like having a mini-microwave the size of a thermos. **FREE Bonus #4:** You'll also get an **Exclusive Ultimate Survival Digital Library.** With these 4 digital books, you'll have the information and tips to help you prepare for an emergency. Together, these digital books are valued at $20, but they're yours free as a thank you for your order. But that's not all because you also get... **FREE Bonus #5:** You also get their **Digital Meal Planning & Recipe Guide**. Inside, you'll find easy ways to whip up delicious meals you'd be proud to serve your kids, and you'll get this brand NEW report for FREE. **FREE Bonus #6:** You also get **Freedom Joe's Survival Coffee.** Rich, aromatic coffee designed to last 25 years. Coffee is one of the most in-demand items when the "you-know-what" hits the fan. Stay alert when the going gets tough with a cup of premium survival coffee from 100% pure Arabica beans. You get 30 servings of delicious, aromatic survival coffee added to your Kit. **FREE Bonus #7:** You also get **Bugle Boy Survival Cocoa.** Warm up with each cup of chocolatey goodness that is sure to satisfy the young and the young at heart. body:
We live in uncertain times.

# The Food Crisis of 2023
We live in uncertain times. There are currently 38 million Americans, including 12 million children, who are struggling with food insecurity. As inflation and supply chain disruptions continue to push food costs higher and higher, families are feeling the weight of financial distress as they struggle to make ends meet. John Boyd Jr., a fourth-generation farmer, warns that food shortages are coming. "For so long, we've enjoyed lots of food in this country, so we've never ever faced a food shortage. The worst is yet to come." **Leading industry sources are worried about food shortages. Experts say more grocery hoarding may come as disruptions push America's food supply "near its breaking point".** As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever. If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to be hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...

name: Allen West
subject: Shall NOT be infringed
body:
The Constitutional Right keeps the wolves at your door and the tyrants in our government at bay ...

| |
---
| | [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z8qfbrqle3mtqohskg41jb8nbu9pkuqqofag5jio_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s3j64o34cth2bs)
---
| | Are you a Citizen? Or a Subject? It's time to decide.Because there is a well-funded, well-organized and growing movement to take away the single most important Constitutional Freedom that keeps us free ...The Constitutional Right keeps the wolves at your door and the tyrants in our government at bay ... It's your Right to KEEP AND BEAR ARMS -- and it's the one you're in imminent danger of losing if we, the people, don't stand up to protect it.[**Will you take a stand for your Second Amendment Rights today?**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z11lad5dp3772j1osu5magi1kqh0t3c56k8d7k8o_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s3j64o34cth2bs) My friend, there's reason I was issued a rifle when I joined the Army ...It's because when all else fails, a firearm is ultimately what determines who's in charge.I know it... You know it ...**That's why Joe Biden and his friends on the Radical Left want you dis-armed.** They'd much rather RULE over SUBJECTS than ANSWER to CITIZENS!There are a lot of groups out there “pledging” to protect your Second Amendment Rights.You've probably got a drawer full of their folding knives ... A few of their duffle bags ... Maybe even a vest or a membership card in your wallet. BUT HERE'S THE THING ... After 50 years of sending out membership renewal notices, pocketknives, and plastic cards, why are your 2nd Amendment Rights in more danger of being taken away from you than they have ever been?But that's where you'll find the Second Amendment Institute.The Second Amendment Institute is a brand-new kind of Amendment advocacy group. A group more concerned with action than image ...[**Will you join the growing membership of the Second Amendment Institute through a donation of $35 today?**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zp88udb1ed5qgighbuce2uqqsqq31hfqecjc50e0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s3j64o34cth2bs) Your much-needed support will help us run into the fight with a multi-pronged attack -- just like our enemies have launched against us:
---
* Legal Battles to protect your 2nd Amendment Rights ...* Our one-of-a-kind Outreach to young people on college campuses* Our Partnership with pro-2nd Amendment Legislators * Our National Conferences and Online Community
---
You don't have to come to one of our conferences, testify in a courtroom or march in the street to get involved with what we're doing here at SAI. That's why our membership and online community has now surpassed the 4.2 MILLION mark!!But one name is missing from that list of over 4.2 million -YOURS!! [**Can you spare $35 to join the Second Amendment Institute and save your Second Amendment Right to bear arms today?**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zp373re0ij6d98h5au9slbuo7ehv9tsdm1ul17ho_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s3j64o34cth2bs) If you can't, maybe you contribute $20. Maybe you can make up for someone who can't afford a $35 or even $20 gift today by blessing them and us with a major gift of $50, $100, $250, $500 or even $1,000 or more.If this seems like a strange way to ask for your support today, you're right -- I told you that SAI is different!But different is good -- it's going to get the job done -- it's going to save your Right to Keep and Bear Arms.Now let's get to work together.God bless you and God Bless America,
---
---
Lieutenant Colonel Allen B. West (US Army, Ret)Member, 112th US Congress
---
P.S. Here's something else that's different about The Second Amendment Institute -- you get to choose your membership cost.That's right -- you read that correctly. Tyler Yzaguirre, the President of SAI, has shared with me that if [**everyone I write to today could spare a gift of $35, that should just about cover what they have planned in the months ahead, and even allow them to grow their outreach efforts**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z6lgr7v4v4im3889oub21q14449n2hn7d2ff7bd8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s3j64o34cth2bs)
---

That's why our membership and online community has now surpassed the 4.2 MILLION mark!!But one name is missing from that list of over 4.2 million -YOURS!! If you can't, maybe you contribute $20. Maybe you can make up for someone who can't afford a $35 or even $20 gift today by blessing them and us with a major gift of $50, $100, $250, $500 or even $1,000 or more.If this seems like a strange way to ask for your support today, you're right -- I told you that SAI is different!But different is good -- it's going to get the job done -- it's going to save your Right to Keep and Bear Arms.Now let's get to work together.God bless you and God Bless America, Lieutenant Colonel Allen B. West (US Army, Ret)Member, 112th US Congress P.S. Here's something else that's different about The Second Amendment Institute -- you get to choose your membership cost.That's right -- you read that correctly. Tyler Yzaguirre, the President of SAI, has shared with me that if | | | American Defense News 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

The 2022 Midterm Elections were one of the toughest battles we've seen**, but the worst has yet to come. **

name: Senator Ted Cruz
subject: Dems are chomping at the bit to defeat me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62479369:JV3SQ9GqN:m:1:3331421248:9A0299FFE836EB13300D68AB8A76F168:r "Those are the people who have never run a statewide campaign in Texas – population 30 million. ")
Peter,

.
Democrats are coming at me with everything they've got.
.
**In 2018, I was outspent and outraised 3-1.**
.
In 2024, I believe my Senate race will cost $100 million.

.
I guarantee you there are a dozen Democrat gazillionaires who are looking back at 2018 and saying: _' we came two points away from beating that S-O-B. And next time I'm writing another million-dollar check.'_
.
**Here 's my prediction:** This race is going to be a firefight but we're going to win not only here in Texas but in states like Montana, Ohio, and West Virginia.
.
I am going to be counting on Senate Republicans to help my colleagues and me win next November so we can FLIP the Senate and finally restore some sanity to Washington.
.
We need to raise $1,000 from this email by the end of the day to make sure Senate Republican races like mine have everything we need to fight back against the Democrat gazillionaires.
.
**_[Would you do me the honor of chipping in a small amount of that total right now to help us](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62479369:JV3SQ9GqN:m:1:3331421248:9A0299FFE836EB13300D68AB8A76F168:r)_**** _[ensure we don 't wind up short? ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62479369:JV3SQ9GqN:m:1:3331421248:9A0299FFE836EB13300D68AB8A76F168:r)_**
.

name: Mark
subject: My father was an alcoholic
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Robinson
body:
| |
---
| | | My friend,

My father was an abusive alcoholic. I grew up in extreme poverty with no shower, no heat, no AC - nothing.

My name is Mark Robinson. I'm a conservative Republican and in 2020 I was elected as the first black Lt. Gov. of North Carolina.
---
| [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62479242:6DXRQ9GNJ:m:1:3365131770:7276B103C9BA71947B8B75F0575CECAC:r)
---

Woke Democrats and the liberal media will tell you that I should be a Democrat by default.

But it is my faith in God, and my love of freedom that makes me who I am.

And it is because of this, the Democrats have made me public enemy number one.

Who I am & what I believe in threatens the woke left & their divisive narrative that race, gender, and economic status determine who we are as Americans.

They have millions in place to destroy me for not falling in line & they'll stop at nothing to shut me up.

But God gives his toughest battles to his strongest soldiers & with your support today, I am confident He will see us through to victory.

---
| | | | | [Chip in $25](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62479242:6DXRQ9GNJ:m:1:3365131770:7276B103C9BA71947B8B75F0575CECAC:r)
---
| | | [Chip in $50](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62479242:6DXRQ9GNJ:m:1:3365131770:7276B103C9BA71947B8B75F0575CECAC:r)

| | | [Chip in $100](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62479242:6DXRQ9GNJ:m:1:3365131770:7276B103C9BA71947B8B75F0575CECAC:r)
---

We have defeated the Democrats once already, and with your help today we can & we WILL do so again.

Thank you & God Bless,

Mark Robinson
Lt. Governor of North Carolina

body:
| |
---
| | | | | **Clarence Thomas RESIGNS?**

body:
Your 3 year membership streak is at risk.

|
---
| | | |
Hey, we haven’t heard from you. Are you letting your 3 year Republican Membership streak disappear or did you miss our email?
---
| | | [RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c02366%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=n5xsuoK6cjbeXZSUGUmBHA&sysid=1 "RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP")
---

The 2022 Midterm Elections were one of the toughest battles we’ve seen**, but the worst has yet to come. **

**The Democrats are prepared to pull out all the stops to attempt to stop us from implementing sound Conservative policies, and worse yet, they’re going to try to stop us from taking back the White House. **

**Now more than ever before, we need you to STAY on our team,_[but you only have until midnight tonight to renew your 2023 House Majority Membership.](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c02367%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=rqtZuYjsROwaT1E%2bITq9gw&sysid=1 "but you only have until
midnight tonight to renew your 2023 House Majority Membership.")_**

---
| | | [RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c02366%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=n5xsuoK6cjbeXZSUGUmBHA&sysid=1 "RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP")
---
You’ve fought with us for three consecutive years, and we need you to stick by our side as we go into battle this year.

We can’t DEFEND OUR MAJORITY without you. **_[Renew your membership before it’s too late>>>](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c02368%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=snA82EYnn7RAsJyi9MfnfA&sysid=1 "Renew your membership
before it’s too late")_**

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Mark, 2023 Membership Services
Date: Tues, Dec 20, 2022 at 11:32 AM
Subject: We hate to see you go.

Friend, for the last **3 years** , you have stood by House Republicans’ side. You’ve supported the Conservative fight furiously and consistently through every battle we’ve seen,**but we have bad news for you. **

**It pains me to tell you that for the first time ever, you’ve failed to renew your Republican Membership and have lost your support streak.**

There’s good news though, Friend. I spoke with leadership about this exceptional circumstance, and they have allowed us to extend our Membership renewal period to **_[11:59 PM TONIGHT.](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c02369%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=pr0HSDWPeNRcMrj79JU0hg&sysid=1 "11:59 PM
TONIGHT.")_**

**_[Are you going to renew your House Majority Membership and become a sustained Republican Member for 4 consecutive years, or have we lost your support to the Left, and you are going to let your streak fade away?](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c02360%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=jsy7j9mJcvd6XQgQ1aGQVQ&sysid=1 "Are you going to renew
your House Majority Membership and become a sustained Republican Member for 4
consecutive years, or have we lost your support to the Left, and you are going to
let your streak fade away?")_**
---
| | | [RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c02366%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=n5xsuoK6cjbeXZSUGUmBHA&sysid=1 "RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP")
---
| [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c02361%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=cAXnGk8AwhX7WGYdvF6XHQ&sysid=1 "ORDER NOW")
---

We just finished the biggest battle of our lives. The 2022 Midterm Elections took everything we had, and the fight still isn’t over. More than ever, we need our strongest grassroots supporters on our side.

You only have until **_[11:59 PM](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c02362%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=NRhLz7qx16tuapufc86MBQ&sysid=1 "11:59 PM")_** to let us know if you plan to stand against the Left and their radical socialist agenda for a 3rd year in a row. **_[Renew before it’s too late>>>](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c02363%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=1iN4ev%2bL66VO9sWu48wnWw&sysid=1 "Renew before it’s too
late")_**

Americans across the country are counting on you. Don’t let them down.

Thank you,

Mark, National Republican Membership Office

name: Aurora Regino
subject: We’re up against an evil unlike anything I’ve seen in my life – and it grows more powerful by the day.
body:
| |
---
| | Peter, I never thought it would be me. I'd seen the news headlines and the crazy videos of activist teachers talking about how they indoctrinated students with ideas about sexuality and gender, against parents' wishes and behind their backs... But I never thought in a million years it would happen to my family. _And then it did._ My 11-year-old daughter went to the guidance counselor, after a death in our family, for help processing that loss. In a meeting that was supposed to help my daughter manage her grief, her guidance counselor convinced her to begin identifying as a boy at school. She went into that office as my daughter and left with a boy's name asking to be called a "he." It took just minutes. All of this was done without my knowledge - and even worse, the school told her to hide all of this from me. [**So, I 'm suing Chico Unified School District with the help of the Center for American Liberty - not for damages, or for emotional distress, but to put an end to its "Parental Secrecy Policy" that directs teachers and staff to hide a child's "social transition" from parents.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62479806:JS2hT9G0N:m:1:3365131770:AE2EF896058F6EA769B0319BDBA83528:r) Because when we win this lawsuit, we'll set a precedent nationwide. My daughter might have wanted to tell me about her "new identity" right away - because I'm her mother, she trusts me, and she knows I love her unconditionally. **_But her guidance counselor discouraged her from talking to me about it._** She encouraged her to "come out" to her teachers, her peers - everyone but me. It was two months after the initial meeting by the time I found out what was going on, and it wasn't because the school notified me or because my daughter told me. It was because my daughter told my mother who then told me. And thankfully we were able to put an end to this. My daughter is doing well. She goes by the name I gave her, and knows she is a girl. But I know we were the lucky ones. I know that if the school had its way, my daughter might be on medications and thinking about dangerous surgeries, changing her body forever, putting her own health at risk. And in my state, they could've done all of it behind my back. But I'm not moving; I'm fighting back! Because the truth is, what starts in California never stays here. But I don't stand a chance without you. [**Will you make a generous, tax-deductible donation to my lawsuit today, and take a stand for American children and parental rights?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62479806:JS2hT9G0N:m:1:3365131770:AE2EF896058F6EA769B0319BDBA83528:r) We're up against an evil unlike anything I've seen in my life - and it grows more powerful by the day. But the truth is on our side. When patriotic Americans come together, it doesn't matter who stands against us.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
| | Aurora Regino

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: It’s time to find solutions, not just complain
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
EVERY GOP Candidate Should Make These EASY Commitments. Do you agree?

| [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c02388%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=SHzgFE9vZ%2fMEqVpQiwJfrw&sysid=1)
Fellow American -

I'm running on a vision to answer the question of what it means to be an American in the year 2023. Merit. Truth. Free speech. Accountability. I believe deep in my bones these ideals still exist.

I am running for President to **revive** the conservative ideals that put this country into motion 250 years ago, and to create an alternative to the failed, woke leftist policies - not just complain about them.

How do we get this done? _**I challenge every GOP candidate to join me in some easy commitments:**_
1. End affirmative action
2. Abandon the climate cult
3. Total decoupling from China
4. 8-year limits for all federal bureaucrats
5. Say NO to central bank digital currencies
6. Release the "state action" files

Fellow American, Republicans can't be asleep at the wheel any longer, I need you on my team. **[Chip in $1 or more if you agree that our next president should commit to these 6 things!](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c02389%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=NajYwSxRJwJLtP20dGUe5w&sysid=1)**

Let's stop just complaining about the Left and DO something about it.

Stand with me today,

[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c02388%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=SHzgFE9vZ%2fMEqVpQiwJfrw&sysid=1)
Vivek Ramaswamy

| [** WATCH NOW → **](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c02380%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=XlgJfDfrzlqf4zjGCyo06A&sysid=1)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[ ** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c02381%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=6zAeYstTU2ABBZy9Eoc%2fQA&sysid=1)

---

| [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c02382%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=LlDy9J36Q0KEfHD4bGYdoA&sysid=1) | [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c02383%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=phRhB%2bw6F5X2IBsZQDFcUA&sysid=1) | [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c02384%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=rCs6aVtQFSfZe9fqkrGZGg&sysid=1)
---|---|---

name: Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=1f88ea87aa5f46368a571aaf6a69e032&_e=vhTzTHsvZ6KfYg_pH1O0Y_kENtU3OYwZTcdVkHs0WTFAv34IyYdPw12McMct8vFOY5mP40j7d8Z5F3-7YK4EJkIyy1iT2_rt3GUSfeVxTfe1osyCwB68gACYjh6zfqav_6FwmCrkGrq0DYrCpZykSdA5VflbIJ6cl3w2EESxiiuzhrQHUtE1ibRzNdgPPuqFa4i1p7oTYMLJlDJDGyakSqNKCus2NGiaz4L098eO_v9KIohHiBTH-CmXCqEvPanaZlRLHyl-duYQ-XnHros8a2Nb9SkL7-awbX2_Q1IjElZkvlP_zIjn1s9geA0vNBjJURwnYuh-hRgYbLU1K3OjAVqoLsl_Dvp7MR1DZUe5-tcAHE2kTYtpMCM3k72tqLY_SebVX01iDC_da1EiFkeOXg%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=1f88ea87aa5f46368a571aaf6a69e032&_e=vhTzTHsvZ6KfYg_pH1O0Y_kENtU3OYwZTcdVkHs0WTFAv34IyYdPw12McMct8vFOY5mP40j7d8Z5F3-7YK4EJkIyy1iT2_rt3GUSfeVxTfe1osyCwB68gACYjh6zfqav_6FwmCrkGrq0DYrCpZykSdA5VflbIJ6cl3w2EESxiiuzhrQHUtE1ibRzNdgPPuqFa4i1p7oTYMLJlDJDGyakSqNKCus2NGiaz4L098eO_v9KIohHiBTH-CmXCqEvPana1goE2CpoBsnqxni8n-VMeOVHJ6uhYSiz3ivjlZMIaJQUrieTD96tm2-t39_Cq4nwmLIeZdhRQFAM2x8y7nJji17_9C1Zb8LWEXBnmg-4ov6tTjP23HjsPU48xxbbjyEC1POJBG2-sisZQdpsVBoY5Q%3D%3D) For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=1f88ea87aa5f46368a571aaf6a69e032&_e=vhTzTHsvZ6KfYg_pH1O0Y_kENtU3OYwZTcdVkHs0WTFAv34IyYdPw12McMct8vFOY5mP40j7d8Z5F3-7YK4EJkIyy1iT2_rt3GUSfeVxTfe1osyCwB68gACYjh6zfqav_6FwmCrkGrq0DYrCpZykSdA5VflbIJ6cl3w2EESxiiuzhrQHUtE1ibRzNdgPPuqFa4i1p7oTYMLJlDJDGyakSqNKCus2NGiaz4L098eO_v9KIohHiBTH-CmXCqEvPanaR5WbRHyxcDTWVOS70kwDan_HwUXQL0NsIot_ldqhn0eDNB6vKbbbNsPiA2DP-T6XWbLe2TZn0AqwoQNnzblYoR4xa_NpTUjHXD8mIJSvISgmN1Z2d1vwpD1EQfKYD_DF6hcMG6TkJVLB7zcihpJSBQ%3D%3D) And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Reclaiming American Freedom
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
[**unsubscribe**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_s=1f88ea87aa5f46368a571aaf6a69e032&_t=iG2UlqN2aSsLaja_KnCvjxyDj8j9XEbMgnDRtTmubW-BKrmVTb7HmI2o6YDnTxt5JWSlDbd2c4DAEzehiUYDxNsXXxB445iBQWJ0J42WoL0%3D)

name: Membership Services
subject: Your membership has been suspended
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
This offer ends today

|
---
| | |

---

**YOUR REPUBLICAN MEMBERSHIP HAS BEEN SUSPENDED**

---

Friend,

name: Conservatives Give
subject: Silicon Valley, Signature Banks’ Collapse — Could your bank be next?
body:
Silicon Valley Bank was the second-largest bank collapse in history.

| Dear Reader, Silicon Valley Bank was the second-largest bank collapse in history. Second only to Washington Mutual when it went under in 2008. Then Signature Bank of NY was taken over by regulators Making it the second massive bank failure in 3 days. [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=36cc47d64515411d99d93c9da2fa410d&_e=rjGUgj7g8XCVZ3ngvS_WhUAnaLlA2Gy8vqBqPNgxSyhlo5eZeOOmO3fqtdVgBql0ZZRfL8fDISoxOBSc4-AewBbfthZTL8IG8jb71Aly6HK4FRHep8ft4Vwf4m5JtS-XXXh6C8pqDtzLAdqgThIQ-WNqTkv38uq5coZOyF33Nb5FNtn5N7O3itCYzn6-gF1nopNYBJdZaJ7T75TfMTHZ1k1RN21pxwgDLmB9QE_kQ1MJ9t5qOZ3UKW1CcOP_1fGo) These events beg the question: Is your bank safe? Is your money safe? With all that's been going on, former Goldman Sachs executive Dr. Nomi Prins used to think a crash was inevitable. One that could wipe out the savings of investors, seniors and retirees. She still believes there is going to be an economic crisis. Just not the kind of crisis most people expect. **[Read the full story here.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=36cc47d64515411d99d93c9da2fa410d&_e=rjGUgj7g8XCVZ3ngvS_WhUAnaLlA2Gy8vqBqPNgxSyhlo5eZeOOmO3fqtdVgBql0ZZRfL8fDISoxOBSc4-AewBbfthZTL8IG8jb71Aly6HJCPG4ReAgUhE1tcKgUMEc6rmxsSsW1S0JnGV-8ncNY-ZnEN4dTQV3jXnDjAu_YH6LpDuJdeeF2CpJRhpNWB4XVCoVw9pAf6E1oXlihpb7rDBe8FFJ6Oa0LuN4_F6YoAyMSdX4Wzy0RJtvo_1Xl6Cyo)** Regards, Maria Bonaventura Senior Managing Editor, _Rogue Economics_ **P.S.** We're on the brink of the greatest transfer of wealth in American history. It's a complete transformation of America using the financial system as a tool for change. **[Find out more here.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=36cc47d64515411d99d93c9da2fa410d&_e=rjGUgj7g8XCVZ3ngvS_WhUAnaLlA2Gy8vqBqPNgxSyhlo5eZeOOmO3fqtdVgBql0ZZRfL8fDISoxOBSc4-AewBbfthZTL8IG8jb71Aly6HLufbQEGicUS2Ppu4qWZxHEMUw43h7JeXf4vAOqhXu6eN6oK4uo1WnJeVHR4ZJsDWV5lb7JpP9aXoRQ1ooyLcGGTntR1hUow7pw2Xqpa9Cx0bH0oaLdlEZ_WMu86c5l9HTiZ83-cpbimOlyfPGK-OQI)**

| | | **Democrats in the Senate have introduced legislation to make Washington DC a state and they 're seeing OVERWHELMING SUPPORT.**

This is NOT a threat to be taken lightly. DC is a FAR LEFT stronghold. Should it become a state, it would PERMANENTLY give Democrats two more far left Senators that they could use to transform America BEYOND RECOGNITION.

**The following Democrats are in FULL SUPPORT:**

The Democrats are in FULL CONTROL of the Senate and the White House. Chuck Schumer wants this to happen. Joe Biden wants this to happen.

A Republican House is the LAST line of defense.

Democrats know they can't win with standard tactics so they're making a power play by trying to flip the game board to their advantage!

It is IMPERATIVE that we stop this radical power grab right here and now. If the Dems get away with this, NOTHING. ELSE. MATTERS.

name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: Survey on an urgent matter.
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

| | This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7205e860f7ba4340972d3733aeec8328&_e=nstbWCsXdHuZiQwiZENBKPgE-_i2hBA4tz5sMZdTxQztgJsVxFZdZrk5NzbxZacgMWE6vDTT4prp0Mrl569LTI8ZjNTvoSRnADhkxuteVOsMQvw_qblv2PYzEygTA3brjkbco1B9TuYg8OEZOP61X9iOY3LtLTaozbMmTaap3zxeskcoEzLuP6uXIok_Wtpg4LfzAjDtLQk7ZLjufCnvifjhovSWy-9Y_eA7FyK0FCV-XhtRVogfp9K2Al9DbX4uOr_vVid13GIcbzjJsuJ4YWbisf6mkAHUVPh7RFR_2QayOgHQnqf8zXJLImfP6E3aHsoJ2TlRQ8waIpd6nHsL-fCqp6b-gzoSEy5YRduQhS6r-YiWrlR7zvQYF0YMX_A21TND4aCssCZp2pz9-sIWjq8QUBB9e2w1yyrOCjenTrA%3D)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection **by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7205e860f7ba4340972d3733aeec8328&_e=nstbWCsXdHuZiQwiZENBKPgE-_i2hBA4tz5sMZdTxQztgJsVxFZdZrk5NzbxZacgMWE6vDTT4prp0Mrl569LTI8ZjNTvoSRnADhkxuteVOsMQvw_qblv2PYzEygTA3brjkbco1B9TuYg8OEZOP61X9iOY3LtLTaozbMmTaap3zxeskcoEzLuP6uXIok_Wtpg4LfzAjDtLQk7ZLjufCnvifjhovSWy-9Y_eA7FyK0FCV-XhtRVogfp9K2Al9DbX4uqw6wofhGFb1-ljbjur7hcpGGd__TGpnt5_UctaS7yuGAkHzEchGXMQ1Yp-gJA74ZhezvSx1OslfFtLJu6Kdrt4W4_ZfR71a6XohSoTBIAdDdncHWBczK0y8ntIdIT2Xj7oIjN1UZ3gEt57gRq-pjACitMogUWPJhQMrE0oSQ6F4%3D)**
## Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?
[YES](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7205e860f7ba4340972d3733aeec8328&_e=nstbWCsXdHuZiQwiZENBKPgE-_i2hBA4tz5sMZdTxQztgJsVxFZdZrk5NzbxZacgMWE6vDTT4prp0Mrl569LTI8ZjNTvoSRnADhkxuteVOsMQvw_qblv2PYzEygTA3brjkbco1B9TuYg8OEZOP61X9iOY3LtLTaozbMmTaap3zxeskcoEzLuP6uXIok_Wtpg4LfzAjDtLQk7ZLjufCnvifjhovSWy-9Y_eA7FyK0FCV-XhtRVogfp9K2Al9DbX4usnWXGwJALb5qZaz_lA8o-_L8CWtOQvV-lXaUHa8H1s8pBUemXb5jZvqb87xdg-au8V951oyCPIyi8ymCVYhklkPRfxmx3WnRyT_brdqyTWiAOOlgnmDbMqicUX5nUJdm65P84j5YlioJLXwaws_4NlbCWzYeLiMgHR5SBK4ORrs%3D) [NO](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7205e860f7ba4340972d3733aeec8328&_e=nstbWCsXdHuZiQwiZENBKPgE-_i2hBA4tz5sMZdTxQztgJsVxFZdZrk5NzbxZacgMWE6vDTT4prp0Mrl569LTI8ZjNTvoSRnADhkxuteVOsMQvw_qblv2PYzEygTA3brjkbco1B9TuYg8OEZOP61X9iOY3LtLTaozbMmTaap3zxeskcoEzLuP6uXIok_Wtpg4LfzAjDtLQk7ZLjufCnvifjhovSWy-9Y_eA7FyK0FCV-XhtRVogfp9K2Al9DbX4unaNl8Q3ki4iRPs8rrw2R8kL2XRVz4416b8uXYiBdX2d1tHKGyetRPsmh0Sp93VDqZ7-F1FcEOMnorqS1mjrTTUWXHasPtY7tE3HjtYxZUyUaDofziQWrIR3zsmreJKJgFvQ0e4N4YqeeFN8O0TkbGCdF4s0V-fIjXq9pTGns_cA%3D) For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7205e860f7ba4340972d3733aeec8328&_e=nstbWCsXdHuZiQwiZENBKPgE-_i2hBA4tz5sMZdTxQztgJsVxFZdZrk5NzbxZacgMWE6vDTT4prp0Mrl569LTI8ZjNTvoSRnADhkxuteVOsMQvw_qblv2PYzEygTA3brjkbco1B9TuYg8OEZOP61X9iOY3LtLTaozbMmTaap3zxeskcoEzLuP6uXIok_Wtpg4LfzAjDtLQk7ZLjufCnvifjhovSWy-9Y_eA7FyK0FCV-XhtRVogfp9K2Al9DbX4ugRmFmtfdEShS4xMsiDuN6Vy22iKr6n75SrcC1uiZs0PuRSpriupeoriohPPFrkQHiw-1Ll_5uQ398RGsJ-nkRIkzyHs_CuZwNZpXNiyPKBl3t9t6b-MAY_Bigkp6Yy8JCuI0hqDgHuvAd-OUCWTJkVcAJW4rSMtz0iei8ZFi17U%3D)**
** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

name: Ronny Jackson
subject: Send a message to President Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Texans for Ronny Jackson
body:
| | **I 'm sure you've gotten a ton of messages about the arrest of President Trump, but this one doesn't require your money, your number, or your email.**
---
This isn't one of those emails.
This is Congressman Ronny Jackson.
I was President Trump's White House physician, and now, I'm proudly his strongest ally in the House.
Listen, I'm sure your email has been blowing up with unsolicited messages about Trump's potential arrest.
I'm sure you've gotten messages from random organizations you've never heard of before.
**And I 'm positive you've gotten emails from Swamp Creature "Republicans" who claim to be on Trump's side, but behind closed doors secretly want him to rot away in a prison cell.**
I get these emails too, but this one is different.
As Trump's top ally in the House, I speak with him often - very, very often.
[**So I asked my team to make a page where President Trump 's top supporters can send him their own personal message as he faces the biggest political Witch Hunt in American history.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62479590:J9cX69GXN:m:1:3331421248:B90CF41415F92EFF666931DA57FB1797:r)
And again, this doesn't require your money, your number, or your email.
| [ **SEND A MESSAGE TO TRUMP** ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62479590:J9cX69GXN:m:1:3331421248:B90CF41415F92EFF666931DA57FB1797:r)
---
But just a fair warning, **responses will be cut off at midnight tonight.**
My team needs time to organize them before President Trump lands in my home state of Texas for his FIRST rally since announcing his candidacy.
So I'm humbly asking:[ **Please send your message to President Trump today.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62479590:J9cX69GXN:m:1:3331421248:B90CF41415F92EFF666931DA57FB1797:r)
I know how much he loves his supporters
Thank you & God Bless,
Ronny Jackson

name: Aurora Regino
subject: I never thought in a million years it would happen to my family.
body:
| |
---
| | Peter, I never thought it would be me. I'd seen the news headlines and the crazy videos of activist teachers talking about how they indoctrinated students with ideas about sexuality and gender, against parents' wishes and behind their backs... But I never thought in a million years it would happen to my family. _And then it did._ My 11-year-old daughter went to the guidance counselor, after a death in our family, for help processing that loss. In a meeting that was supposed to help my daughter manage her grief, her guidance counselor convinced her to begin identifying as a boy at school. She went into that office as my daughter and left with a boy's name asking to be called a "he." It took just minutes. All of this was done without my knowledge - and even worse, the school told her to hide all of this from me. [**So, I 'm suing Chico Unified School District with the help of the Center for American Liberty - not for damages, or for emotional distress, but to put an end to its "Parental Secrecy Policy" that directs teachers and staff to hide a child's "social transition" from parents.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62479541:6IgKp9GNn:m:1:3391001263:BD2C06DAC3FDC5BA5AD5AC330A123EB2:r) Because when we win this lawsuit, we'll set a precedent nationwide. My daughter might have wanted to tell me about her "new identity" right away - because I'm her mother, she trusts me, and she knows I love her unconditionally. **_But her guidance counselor discouraged her from talking to me about it._** She encouraged her to "come out" to her teachers, her peers - everyone but me. It was two months after the initial meeting by the time I found out what was going on, and it wasn't because the school notified me or because my daughter told me. It was because my daughter told my mother who then told me. And thankfully we were able to put an end to this. My daughter is doing well. She goes by the name I gave her, and knows she is a girl. But I know we were the lucky ones. I know that if the school had its way, my daughter might be on medications and thinking about dangerous surgeries, changing her body forever, putting her own health at risk. And in my state, they could've done all of it behind my back. But I'm not moving; I'm fighting back! Because the truth is, what starts in California never stays here. But I don't stand a chance without you. [**Will you make a generous, tax-deductible donation to my lawsuit today, and take a stand for American children and parental rights?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62479541:6IgKp9GNn:m:1:3391001263:BD2C06DAC3FDC5BA5AD5AC330A123EB2:r) We're up against an evil unlike anything I've seen in my life - and it grows more powerful by the day. But the truth is on our side. When patriotic Americans come together, it doesn't matter who stands against us.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
| | Aurora Regino
---
| | [**DONATE**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62479541:6IgKp9GNn:m:1:3391001263:BD2C06DAC3FDC5BA5AD5AC330A123EB2:r)
---

And in my state, they could've done all of it behind my back. But I'm not moving; I'm fighting back! Because the truth is, what starts in California never stays here. But I don't stand a chance without you. We're up against an evil unlike anything I've seen in my life - and it grows more powerful by the day. But the truth is on our side. When patriotic Americans come together, it doesn't matter who stands against us. | | Sincerely, | | Aurora Regino | | | | The Center for American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free speech and anti-civil liberties trends.
