body:
The Constitutional Right keeps the wolves at your door and the tyrants in our government at bay ...

| |
---
| | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5f6c24711bb14070959bca21da911ad6&_e=YGfTDTDxlSkwmtpYd0YYdfZ5DeHUgieirlCt2HBwyq2W9VasIJcNTaNW0cnvXtuA0N4wrKeMPQxz_NyjIttWNkLvHJsx0fJIyuHp6XU0qpoa37ZqKDpVtM1aOu-0BuyShgXqMdKOMEg80T1YdigoMmnn8QJ7Z_jixi9Sz2mCkJbaDVj5PLUbQKmBqf2xdrqmUtTRhsgr7gSl63jczb4nOWSOwJZ1X_L0LtwnYxn6xaPxBQkpiADG7aReLuZnYzbs6Y_VC0_-h3Sj79Wyhj89Fg43WlB4yJeeiXFW1tuEiQL9Vi0V29PJM1oam4tBWEKlsAF4O03an_a3Eh1N-Elj-lyB_iPYk6K8-NmRKVMamZJXJ08QZkMH_kGnD0Om_hBF)
---
| | Are you a Citizen? Or a Subject? It's time to decide. Because there is a well-funded, well-organized and growing movement to take away the single most important Constitutional Freedom that keeps us free ... The Constitutional Right keeps the wolves at your door and the tyrants in our government at bay ... It's your Right to KEEP AND BEAR ARMS -- and it's the one you're in imminent danger of losing if we, the people, don't stand up to protect it. [**Will you take a stand for your Second Amendment Rights today?**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5f6c24711bb14070959bca21da911ad6&_e=YGfTDTDxlSkwmtpYd0YYdfZ5DeHUgieirlCt2HBwyq2W9VasIJcNTaNW0cnvXtuA0N4wrKeMPQxz_NyjIttWNkLvHJsx0fJIyuHp6XU0qpoa37ZqKDpVtM1aOu-0BuyShgXqMdKOMEg80T1YdigoMmnn8QJ7Z_jixi9Sz2mCkJbaDVj5PLUbQKmBqf2xdrqmUtTRhsgr7gSl63jczb4nOWSOwJZ1X_L0LtwnYxn6xaMLG93v_OzuoRN4_WlKpmBRbA1NpXX5fDcMgJK2hGZp9xoqWwlfl4_cqsNGUe6U6bEyz_3zUKlbOfXEaK17z_2cZG8iUVK4hX7jQJ5Ms65Xr3P8H_z_G4XPp3GMngPF9ENtmya03T7MSMOKSb56Bm0r) My friend, there's reason I was issued a rifle when I joined the Army ... It's because when all else fails, a firearm is ultimately what determines who's in charge. I know it... You know it ... **That's why Joe Biden and his friends on the Radical Left want you dis-armed.** They'd much rather RULE over SUBJECTS than ANSWER to CITIZENS! There are a lot of groups out there "pledging" to protect your Second Amendment Rights. You've probably got a drawer full of their folding knives ... A few of their duffle bags ... Maybe even a vest or a membership card in your wallet. BUT HERE'S THE THING ... After 50 years of sending out membership renewal notices, pocketknives, and plastic cards, why are your 2nd Amendment Rights in more danger of being taken away from you than they have ever been? But that's where you'll find the Second Amendment Institute. The Second Amendment Institute is a brand-new kind of Amendment advocacy group. A group more concerned with action than image ... [**Will you join the growing membership of the Second Amendment Institute through a donation of $35 today?**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5f6c24711bb14070959bca21da911ad6&_e=YGfTDTDxlSkwmtpYd0YYdfZ5DeHUgieirlCt2HBwyq2W9VasIJcNTaNW0cnvXtuA0N4wrKeMPQxz_NyjIttWNkLvHJsx0fJIyuHp6XU0qpoa37ZqKDpVtM1aOu-0BuyShgXqMdKOMEg80T1YdigoMmnn8QJ7Z_jixi9Sz2mCkJbaDVj5PLUbQKmBqf2xdrqmUtTRhsgr7gSl63jczb4nOWSOwJZ1X_L0LtwnYxn6xaMDGDRSGOlN78a_MHXuOzmQUdZXViUF_-d11JCGSqB80oEiPRibzhreVQHyzeX7SzVpr4F4hFj7fYrGPEAs9126IJ4YUdOIh2_hTwrcJeud7TcI1lPZvWNxdJ90hE_d5o-_x_r3_s84YX-f-7xYgl6E) Your much-needed support will help us run into the fight with a multi-pronged attack -- just like our enemies have launched against us:
---
* Legal Battles to protect your 2nd Amendment Rights ... * Our one-of-a-kind Outreach to young people on college campuses * Our Partnership with pro-2nd Amendment Legislators * Our National Conferences and Online Community
---
You don't have to come to one of our conferences, testify in a courtroom or march in the street to get involved with what we're doing here at SAI. That's why our membership and online community has now surpassed the 4.2 MILLION mark!! But one name is missing from that list of over 4.2 million -YOURS!! [**Can you spare $35 to join the Second Amendment Institute and save your Second Amendment Right to bear arms today?**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5f6c24711bb14070959bca21da911ad6&_e=YGfTDTDxlSkwmtpYd0YYdfZ5DeHUgieirlCt2HBwyq2W9VasIJcNTaNW0cnvXtuA0N4wrKeMPQxz_NyjIttWNkLvHJsx0fJIyuHp6XU0qpoa37ZqKDpVtM1aOu-0BuyShgXqMdKOMEg80T1YdigoMmnn8QJ7Z_jixi9Sz2mCkJbaDVj5PLUbQKmBqf2xdrqmUtTRhsgr7gSl63jczb4nOWSOwJZ1X_L0LtwnYxn6xaPxRVRujaiZs6cN2gTAUBea_oqv3Z0bRWOJUABAu4oxtofdhSGjUf4KDL9M3G-rys4HVPabcKRXBU_QGTz5Fn3-MrwtMMac50TMLsaEtReRVpHRrKG_3pOcAha5L0mq2sxGTH5_V7gGeWZfTWefjrKR) If you can't, maybe you contribute $20. Maybe you can make up for someone who can't afford a $35 or even $20 gift today by blessing them and us with a major gift of $50, $100, $250, $500 or even $1,000 or more. If this seems like a strange way to ask for your support today, you're right -- I told you that SAI is different! But different is good -- it's going to get the job done -- it's going to save your Right to Keep and Bear Arms. Now let's get to work together. God bless you and God Bless America,
---
---
Lieutenant Colonel Allen B. West (US Army, Ret) Member, 112th US Congress
---
P.S. Here's something else that's different about The Second Amendment Institute -- you get to choose your membership cost. That's right -- you read that correctly. Tyler Yzaguirre, the President of SAI, has shared with me that if [**everyone I write to today could spare a gift of $35, that should just about cover what they have planned in the months ahead, and even allow them to grow their outreach efforts**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5f6c24711bb14070959bca21da911ad6&_e=YGfTDTDxlSkwmtpYd0YYdfZ5DeHUgieirlCt2HBwyq2W9VasIJcNTaNW0cnvXtuA0N4wrKeMPQxz_NyjIttWNkLvHJsx0fJIyuHp6XU0qpoa37ZqKDpVtM1aOu-0BuyShgXqMdKOMEg80T1YdigoMmnn8QJ7Z_jixi9Sz2mCkJbaDVj5PLUbQKmBqf2xdrqmUtTRhsgr7gSl63jczb4nOWSOwJZ1X_L0LtwnYxn6xaMlhvgTb8Qk0RekRVNe5NcCGDsw99vcTaAqyfVGinoogaiKZfKBtXM4XL2pW113bsjVD8O0BdNsAjkorqgBBPF3ldzOAe6xxLJsrvhJyhFSicOCNHZ_2ZZws0dCEHha965dz6QKtBWzZT8DWNFrCYSh)

After 50 years of sending out membership renewal notices, pocketknives, and plastic cards, why are your 2nd Amendment Rights in more danger of being taken away from you than they have ever been? But that's where you'll find the Second Amendment Institute. The Second Amendment Institute is a brand-new kind of Amendment advocacy group. A group more concerned with action than image ... Your much-needed support will help us run into the fight with a multi-pronged attack -- just like our enemies have launched against us: Legal Battles to protect your 2nd Amendment Rights ... Our one-of-a-kind Outreach to young people on college campuses Our Partnership with pro-2nd Amendment Legislators Our National Conferences and Online Community You don't have to come to one of our conferences, testify in a courtroom or march in the street to get involved with what we're doing here at SAI. That's why our membership and online community has now surpassed the 4.2 MILLION mark!! But one name is missing from that list of over 4.2 million -YOURS!! If you can't, maybe you contribute $20. Maybe you can make up for someone who can't afford a $35 or even $20 gift today by blessing them and us with a major gift of $50, $100, $250, $500 or even $1,000 or more. If this seems like a strange way to ask for your support today, you're right -- I told you that SAI is different! But different is good -- it's going to get the job done -- it's going to save your Right to Keep and Bear Arms. Now let's get to work together. God bless you and God Bless America, Lieutenant Colonel Allen B. West (US Army, Ret) Member, 112th US Congress P.S. Here's something else that's different about The Second Amendment Institute -- you get to choose your membership cost. That's right -- you read that correctly. Tyler Yzaguirre, the President of SAI, has shared with me that if | | | Full Mag News 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

name: Kevin McCarthy
subject: Our GOP House is the LAST line of defense!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
| |
---
| | | **Democrats in the Senate have introduced legislation to make Washington DC a state and they 're seeing OVERWHELMING SUPPORT.**

This is NOT a threat to be taken lightly. DC is a FAR LEFT stronghold. Should it become a state, it would PERMANENTLY give Democrats two more far left Senators that they could use to transform America BEYOND RECOGNITION.

**The following Democrats are in FULL SUPPORT:**

---
| | | _Chuck Schumer (D-N.Y.)
Tom Carper (D-Del.)
Chris Van Hollen (D-Md.)
Tammy Baldwin (D-Wis.)

---

Chris Murphy (D-Conn.)
Patty Murray (D-Wash.)
Jon Ossoff (D-Ga.)
Alex Padilla (D-Calif.)
Gary Peters (D-Mich.)
Jack Reed (D-R.I.)
Bernie Sanders (I-Vt.)
Brian Schatz (D-Hawaii)
Tina Smith (D-Minn.)
Debbie Stabenow (D-Mich.)
Mark Warner (D-Va.)
Raphael Warnock (D-Ga.)
Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.)
Peter Welch (D-Vt.)
Sheldon Whitehouse (D-R.I.)
Ron Wyden (D-Ore.)._

---
| | [STOP DC STATEHOOD](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62479676:JNdEL9GNZ:m:1:3365131770:E42D883EF24B5C4C04EEF8690BDFDCAB:r)
---

The Democrats are in FULL CONTROL of the Senate and the White House. Chuck Schumer wants this to happen. Joe Biden wants this to happen.

A Republican House is the LAST line of defense.

Democrats know they can't win with standard tactics so they're making a power play by trying to flip the game board to their advantage!

It is IMPERATIVE that we stop this radical power grab right here and now. If the Dems get away with this, NOTHING. ELSE. MATTERS.

**[Will you join your fellow patriots and House Republicans in taking a stand against DC Statehood and this blatant Dem scheme for power?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62479676:JNdEL9GNZ:m:1:3365131770:E42D883EF24B5C4C04EEF8690BDFDCAB:r "Will you join
your fellow patriots and House Republicans in taking a stand against DC Statehood and this blatant Dem scheme for power? ")**

---

Thank you,
Kevin McCarthy

name: Jon Tester
subject: Mitch McConnell is looking for weakness
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester]
Folks, in just a moment I’ll ask you to split a contribution between Seth Moulton and my campaign before our first public fundraising deadline [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester] , but first I hope you’ll give me a moment to explain why it’s so important to give — especially today.
I’m the most vulnerable Senator up for reelection in 2024 and Republicans have already named me as a top target. Mitch McConnell and his super PAC allies will throw everything they’ve got at me to try to flip my seat red — they’ve already started spending money on attack ads against me.
On top of that, our first end-of-quarter FEC deadline is in 5 days. This will be the first time our fundraising numbers will go public since announcing my official reelection campaign.
It’s a BIG deal. Mitch McConnell and our potential Republican opponents will get to see just how strong (or vulnerable) our campaign is. If McConnell finds any weaknesses in our report, he’ll think Montana is ripe for the taking. The GOP only needs to flip TWO seats to retake the Senate majority, and they’re laser focused on Montana.
Let’s be clear: This election isn’t a sure thing. Experts say this race is a toss-up and rank Montana as one of the seats most likely to flip red. That’s why it’s SO important you make a contribution today — everything is on the line.
Will you split a contribution between Seth Moulton and my campaign today? We need to raise another $27,402 by March 31st to reach our FEC end-of-quarter goal. Your support couldn’t come at a more critical moment: [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester]
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester]
We’ve won tough battles before, and I’m confident we’ll do it again. Thanks for sticking with me.
— JT
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester]
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/r_WYy1BSbkmUjvconTI5TQ2?unsubscribedata=RETLwsyP8M%2BcpNyLWtjOK0CfSRLq1Yhmg03UPP3Np%2Bc%2BO3YfHup3%2BdNA2bDg3Nrivm94igudi8oa1cfylTbrqhSeQONdVYsiuUGXbR2%2BWegl5xnXDJrfBdSRzTiAwxrztUkArEoW2AEL7s6FQlw2cUX2Tjad1jHHR1EPqZPURkMbOauR5tQf66QuSHfzAS7M%2FM3zQZf8RnJPC1%2BViVtSAgIs7tuKNQpiL6wYZCPXgd5IkzqmzcI4IdMI8VwGytQ9lPYmJqtsKCO%2F94ZUo10MEN07noelm4Aazl%2BfKwZe%2BMFxlsHFBLH7z1mU%2BOLqsD1%2Bj2VEkNobb7aZokidBo1SZZ15VMSnRlUFw8xr2neKZRm7Di1b%2BFs%2BtwKTfKSn7pnhimdbK1gUu3Z0Q3FXUKGKURIC163v356qY1kP7w2IC3k%3D .

body:
| |
---
| | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62478909:Jayrr9GNu:m:1:3331421248:3420C7AB8D370949DF9EBB4414920786:r)
---

We must restore the joy of Christ to our churches and our communities.

We know that our strength comes from our obedience to God and our unflinching conviction in our faith.

Sadly, you'd be hard pressed to find such faith-based conviction in our nation's capital these days. Far too many people are motivated by personal gain, instead of serving a higher purpose.

---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62478909:Jayrr9GNu:m:1:3331421248:3420C7AB8D370949DF9EBB4414920786:r)
---

The amoral politicking and reckless decision making from our leaders in Washington have left our country in a terrible place.

If we are going to bring back the joy of Christ to the people of our nation, __**[we must restore faith-driven leadership to our nation's politics.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62478909:Jayrr9GNu:m:1:3331421248:3420C7AB8D370949DF9EBB4414920786:r "we must elect Christian
conservatives who will lead with moral clarity and act with selflessness.")**__

---
| | [RESTORE FAITH-DRIVEN LEADERSHIP](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62478909:Jayrr9GNu:m:1:3331421248:3420C7AB8D370949DF9EBB4414920786:r)
---

I believe that with more faith-driven leadership, we can meet the mounting challenges facing our nation and make our nation a more prosperous, joyous place.

God Bless,

---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62478909:Jayrr9GNu:m:1:3331421248:3420C7AB8D370949DF9EBB4414920786:r)

subject: President Trump will see your name
body:
| |
---
| | | What these Liberals are doing to President Donald Trump makes me mad as a hornet.

And according to the latest reports, he could be INDICTED AT ANY MOMENT.

_It 's a national disgrace!_

_**[Now we have a choice to make: we can either get mad and stew... or we can do something about it. I'm searching high and low for more patriotic conservatives to help defend President Trump.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62479934:JZJbr9GON:m:1:3365131770:E32A80ED10E15EE9F216006E1F6B700B:r "Now we have a choice to make: we can either get mad and stew... or we can do something

PRESIDENT TRUMP")
---
**These Liberals want President Trump arrested, handcuffed, and perp-walked for maximum public humiliation. I 'm not about to let this happen - and I'm giving you the opportunity to fight back too.**

This is what I'm willing to offer you:

If you agree to help BEFORE President Trump is arrested, I'll make sure your name is sent directly to him. The President will be able to see your name as one of the patriotic conservatives who supported him when he needed it the most.

_How does that sound? _

These Liberals think they can pull a political STUNT like this without any consequences. They're dead wrong. Now, we need your help before it's too late.

Please remember this... You have the chance to do the right thing during one of the most perilous times in our history. President Trump needs us to speak out - for his sake, and for the sake of our country.

_**[If you take this chance, I'll see to it that the President has DIRECT ACCESS to see your name.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62479934:JZJbr9GON:m:1:3365131770:E32A80ED10E15EE9F216006E1F6B700B:r "If you take this chance, I’ll see to it that the President has DIRECT ACCESS to see your
name.")**_

Thank you,

Marsha Blackburn

body:
| |
---
| | | | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62478752:6TEPr9GNX:m:1:3391001263:0C8DDD690D95D8B421B69EB0CCA5BD9B:r)
---

We must restore the joy of Christ to our churches and our communities.

We know that our strength comes from our obedience to God and our unflinching conviction in our faith.

Sadly, you'd be hard pressed to find such faith-based conviction in our nation's capital these days. Far too many people are motivated by personal gain, instead of serving a higher purpose.

---
| [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62478752:6TEPr9GNX:m:1:3391001263:0C8DDD690D95D8B421B69EB0CCA5BD9B:r)
---

The amoral politicking and reckless decision making from our leaders in Washington have left our country in a terrible place.

If we are going to bring back the joy of Christ to the people of our nation, __**[we must restore faith-driven leadership to our nation's politics.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62478752:6TEPr9GNX:m:1:3391001263:0C8DDD690D95D8B421B69EB0CCA5BD9B:r "we must elect Christian conservatives who will lead with moral clarity and act with
selflessness.")**__

---
| | [RESTORE FAITH-DRIVEN LEADERSHIP](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62478752:6TEPr9GNX:m:1:3391001263:0C8DDD690D95D8B421B69EB0CCA5BD9B:r)
---

I believe that with more faith-driven leadership, we can meet the mounting challenges facing our nation and make our nation a more prosperous, joyous place.

God Bless,

---

name: Andy Kim
subject: Early investments have double the impact
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andy Kim for Congress
body:
It's hard to believe the 118th Congress and my THIRD term is already underway. I can't thank you enough for your generous support and help in getting here. Our historic three-peat would not have been possible without you and the thousands of grassroots supporters that make this OUR team.

Last year, I ran against my third-straight self-funding opponent. He and his mom poured millions into the race, and I was deeply outspent for the first time ever. I'm proud of our 2022 win and its strength, but we were forced to use all our resources to get across the finish line.

Can you contribute $3 by our end-of-quarter deadline? Help us ensure the campaign has the resources to rebuild, remain strong in this seat, and deter any opponents that might be considering jumping in. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-andy-kim?refcode=2023-03-26-lookingforward&recurring=0&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=c82357b3-d5cb-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811]

In the three short months since the start of the new Congress, I've been hard at work:

→ I helped create the Congressional Dads Caucus, where I'm fighting for paid family and medical leave and an expansion of the Child Tax Credit.

→ I was selected as the top Democrat on the Armed Services Military Personnel Subcommittee.

→ We opened new district offices in Mercer and Monmouth counties.

→ I introduced legislation to ban Members of Congress from owning stocks, legislation to expand access to affordable childcare for our servicemembers and their families, and a bill to make sure members of the Guard and Reserve have the same access to financial services as those serving on active duty.

I'm proud of my service record in Congress and what we've accomplished together. From 3,900 votes in 2018 to 32,000 in 2022, our margin of victory has grown alongside our record of success. And none of it would be possible without the solid grassroots movement we've built together.

You know as well as I do that we will likely see extremists, uninterested in governing, vying for NJ-03 soon. And they'll have the full support of Washington Republicans as the GOP attempts to grow their slim majority.

We have a big fundraising deadline at the end of March, and early investments will have double the impact as we look to counter any GOP attacks in NJ-03. Can you chip in now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-andy-kim?refcode=2023-03-26-lookingforward&recurring=0&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=c82357b3-d5cb-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811]

More soon,

Andy

name: 4Patriots
subject: The Food Crisis of 2023
body:
We live in uncertain times.

# The Food Crisis of 2023
We live in uncertain times. There are currently 38 million Americans, including 12 million children, who are struggling with food insecurity. As inflation and supply chain disruptions continue to push food costs higher and higher, families are feeling the weight of financial distress as they struggle to make ends meet. John Boyd Jr., a fourth-generation farmer, warns that food shortages are coming. "For so long, we've enjoyed lots of food in this country, so we've never ever faced a food shortage. The worst is yet to come." **Leading industry sources are worried about food shortages. Experts say more grocery hoarding may come as disruptions push America's food supply "near its breaking point".** As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever. If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to be hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

Well, no need to worry anymore... Obviously, waiting on the government for a handout in a disaster just isn't an option. And we were completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of the best-selling [**4Patriots Survival Food Kits**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=dcc7d3192b7843bc8d05862686fc1aff&_e=ue0ukdcqofUaKcgW-ivpkI3PzPCxpq0DWJ-EJir-hSuNklL1w1vnRhtr1PDyU85QzmS_Fr75eZ4aZvz1pPjBvuA5zHR92HL_oWZ27Hp7Pw4SQumTep2-rUCpMcVFDKvUhBTakk55PbKQmKD7dEjWFStQBsK3BglgOSulnP4XgonrSo6jtWiCbFF_OvkW1stgFpH494pnGJVPLP982_w-HwMwooF7u2T4Idfy4KA09esNvIJvoXt0zlsqwYV-jbMCbatLjee2jHPcO7NVl6mCjagA08TmULJbi4eByCO0EHA%3D). Currently the 4Patriots Survival Food Kits are flying off the shelves because:
* **4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value.** This is _not_ ordinary food. This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that helps keep you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high-quality survival food without gross fillers or weird "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are handpacked right in a family-owned facility in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are.
* There's no fancy packaging, it's sturdy, triple-layer stuff and can stand up to most of the crazy things that happen in a crisis. This food **is designed to last for 25 years** , so you have complete peace of mind for the long term. And they're using compact kits so you can store them anywhere in your house without any extra hassle. They're sturdy, water-resistant and stack easily. And extremely covert too.
* You can make these meals in less than 20 minutes. Just add boiling water, simmer, and serve.
* **Customers rave about the delicious flavor of this food - it doesn't taste like "survival food."** And you get a whole slew of choices for breakfast, lunch and dinner so you don't get stuck eating the same thing day-in and day-out.
* **You get an easy, no nonsense monthly payment plan with no interest!**

And that's not all, because... [**You also get $318 worth of FREE gifts!**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=dcc7d3192b7843bc8d05862686fc1aff&_e=ue0ukdcqofUaKcgW-ivpkI3PzPCxpq0DWJ-EJir-hSuNklL1w1vnRhtr1PDyU85QzmS_Fr75eZ4aZvz1pPjBvuA5zHR92HL_oWZ27Hp7Pw4SQumTep2-rUCpMcVFDKvUhBTakk55PbKQmKD7dEjWFTXNvv6X1hA9r5sdRY1nKVqEa2sgmYp6FNmkA2G6odawLQEBBXzQGrQvrHra_en9AbOfjsHB9FE7wr5TXIN7VxHZolN3-8zsR-lPn3eCtDd4Vpn_N9Ewxuopn0c-i5K5ZweERreknQw6lQv4CVCU6xs%3D) **FREE Bonus #1:** because they are so popular and a true foundation for your preparedness plan, they're going to give you _**2**_ of their popular 72-Hour Survival Food Kits when you get your 3-Month Kit today. That's extra meals (on the house), grab-and-go portability and a way to get through a short-term crisis without even breaking into your stash. **People love these kits.** It's one of the top-rated items on our website. And you get... **FREE Bonus #2:** You'll get a **Victory Garden Survival Seed Vault** with thousands of non-GMO heirloom seeds inside, designed to stay fresh for years. You can harvest and replant them over and over again. **FREE Bonus #3:** You also get their **Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater.** With your Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater, you can boil water without fuel, flames, smoke or noise. Use your Sun Kettle to purify water, cook food, wash up, clean up and much more. It's like having a mini-microwave the size of a thermos. **FREE Bonus #4:** You'll also get an **Exclusive Ultimate Survival Digital Library.** With these 4 digital books, you'll have the information and tips to help you prepare for an emergency. Together, these digital books are valued at $20, but they're yours free as a thank you for your order. But that's not all because you also get... **FREE Bonus #5:** You also get their **Digital Meal Planning & Recipe Guide**. Inside, you'll find easy ways to whip up delicious meals you'd be proud to serve your kids, and you'll get this brand NEW report for FREE. **FREE Bonus #6:** You also get **Freedom Joe's Survival Coffee.** Rich, aromatic coffee designed to last 25 years. Coffee is one of the most in-demand items when the "you-know-what" hits the fan. Stay alert when the going gets tough with a cup of premium survival coffee from 100% pure Arabica beans. You get 30 servings of delicious, aromatic survival coffee added to your Kit. **FREE Bonus #7:** You also get **Bugle Boy Survival Cocoa.** Warm up with each cup of chocolatey goodness that is sure to satisfy the young and the young at heart. With your Survival Cocoa Kits, you'll have the satisfying comfort of a steaming cup of cocoa when you and your loved ones need it most. You'll get 14 servings of this taste-tested hot cocoa FREE for arming yourself with survival food. But we're still not done, because you also get... **FREE Bonus #8:** You also get **$25 OFF your next purchase.** This is FREE money in the bank for you. You get $25 off any future purchase of $100 or more. Use it to get whatever you need to round out your preparedness plan... best-selling survival food, solar gadgets and so much more! It's completely up to you. That's what we call an incredible deal. But we want to sweeten the pot. So when you order your 3-Month Survival Food Kit today, you also get... **FREE Bonus #9:** **You get FREE Shipping and Handling on your entire order!** It's not cheap to ship 688 servings of food in two totes (plus all the FREE gifts you're getting). But you deserve it for becoming a loyal customer. And frankly, we want to do it for you. [**Get Your 4Patriots Survival Food Kits Rushed To You Plus All Your FREE Bonuses While Supplies Last!**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=dcc7d3192b7843bc8d05862686fc1aff&_e=ue0ukdcqofUaKcgW-ivpkI3PzPCxpq0DWJ-EJir-hSuNklL1w1vnRhtr1PDyU85QzmS_Fr75eZ4aZvz1pPjBvuA5zHR92HL_oWZ27Hp7Pw4SQumTep2-rUCpMcVFDKvUhBTakk55PbKQmKD7dEjWFVdVzafRf6EDTV5K0a1mE6c3PXC5ETt_FI7Sh1C2n0yw2fWadhgkyIWOX7Sg2ggrHJKTQsnnSRTLgdK08ql4oC77wENm4S8s2wsDloY9K-RdXbsE1aWuoLVn5JZqBn187vbDbOgRix_TxiH6GV5QllE%3D) Isn't that great? The best part is... You'll have the peace of mind and security that comes from having your very own survival food stockpile. On great-tasting, survival food protection without the sticker shock. **Look, this food tastes homemade.** It's built to last the long haul. It's a snap to prepare. And everyone from former Navy SEALs to middle-American grandmas are singing its praises. [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=dcc7d3192b7843bc8d05862686fc1aff&_e=ue0ukdcqofUaKcgW-ivpkI3PzPCxpq0DWJ-EJir-hSuNklL1w1vnRhtr1PDyU85QzmS_Fr75eZ4aZvz1pPjBvuA5zHR92HL_oWZ27Hp7Pw4SQumTep2-rUCpMcVFDKvUhBTakk55PbKQmKD7dEjWFdKsj8MJagWn-s7BTcE_b30UZRLZx6sgGt8iTwLi3Awbo4-JFfVsMJaMvqkkrYOw4ipUOqCnGHrtC5srmL_usJuqa2nGXrMo-1971KL8cyMSKYQXbYj8fzshkgdBFBFuOTAe5t3Zeqd71Dye3qdgogg%3D) You need to get 'er done today. Why? Because if you don't [**take action**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=dcc7d3192b7843bc8d05862686fc1aff&_e=ue0ukdcqofUaKcgW-ivpkI3PzPCxpq0DWJ-EJir-hSuNklL1w1vnRhtr1PDyU85QzmS_Fr75eZ4aZvz1pPjBvuA5zHR92HL_oWZ27Hp7Pw4SQumTep2-rUCpMcVFDKvUhBTakk55PbKQmKD7dEjWFcQbFBjSK-1NN-bwLfGhnK1O5GO4Z8A6KnCYEtljuj9nzL26PjyqGVlfXUki06XbvGjeAmXTBQ7sEYXhxZgAM82fANg9G6fPpSILb8mHHduJpcdEGNAiGjxZR80YZLhsOEUyi08fAmgjEjz8W2NpFjk%3D) to get your food stockpile today, you'll be in the same boat as the brainwashed masses who think "everything is fine." And if a crisis hits and your family asks, "What are we going to eat?" your mouth will go dry, and you'll feel powerless. But what if you decide to secure your food stockpile instead? Just [**imagine how much better you'll feel right away**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=dcc7d3192b7843bc8d05862686fc1aff&_e=ue0ukdcqofUaKcgW-ivpkI3PzPCxpq0DWJ-EJir-hSuNklL1w1vnRhtr1PDyU85QzmS_Fr75eZ4aZvz1pPjBvuA5zHR92HL_oWZ27Hp7Pw4SQumTep2-rUCpMcVFDKvUhBTakk55PbKQmKD7dEjWFYGR1l_9brDQm6PmaMzGA2aiVWLUbREFhq0_UxQnk76t3mKLdQXCQceCuDGypHXOz6je_ujF32OGaz2fJdpRZV9K9KYSDou4VudRNzx0mvUVGsuQZJlQSTmUs1du-9huE5X1c_Xv0oUhJPQRLmySpPc%3D). When a crisis hits, you will be able to calmly reassure them that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. Listen, I can't predict the future. I don't know exactly when or how a crisis will hit. **As it stands today, it's every man for himself.** In a crisis, the loss will be beyond what you can imagine. That's why I want you to have the same peace of mind that I do. [**Get Your 4Patriots Survival Food Kits Rushed To You Plus All Your FREE Bonuses While Supplies Last!**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=dcc7d3192b7843bc8d05862686fc1aff&_e=ue0ukdcqofUaKcgW-ivpkI3PzPCxpq0DWJ-EJir-hSuNklL1w1vnRhtr1PDyU85QzmS_Fr75eZ4aZvz1pPjBvuA5zHR92HL_oWZ27Hp7Pw4SQumTep2-rUCpMcVFDKvUhBTakk55PbKQmKD7dEjWFdLZUNh8WoC-SFdhpruCLCg9dlT0hINEexKXID_QdPQyhX2vje4M5ckMfulVjDM0eEbikZCyGb19dh5VBmJ9EK6UCty7kvFSbOIHeKuzMh7EoQUfg8OYapRfGCVbztnkhlilpoSW6oOHMZv3Ll19Qig%3D) To your survival,

Frank Bates
Patriot Headquarters **More Raving Reviews From Customers!** | | **Rory H.** I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things.
---|---
| **Billy H.** Received my food kit, and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmer. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup.
---|---
| **Kevin S.** The 72 hour kit is a perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start.
---|---
| **Carol B.** I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight, IT WAS DELICIOUS. Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings.
---|---
| **Ken K.** I am not a full-blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal.
---|---
| **Justin A.** My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great.
---|---
| **Gary M.** I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed.

clean_body: We live in uncertain times. The Food Crisis of 2023 We live in uncertain times. There are currently 38 million Americans, including 12 million children, who are struggling with food insecurity. As inflation and supply chain disruptions continue to push food costs higher and higher, families are feeling the weight of financial distress as they struggle to make ends meet. John Boyd Jr., a fourth-generation farmer, warns that food shortages are coming. "For so long, we've enjoyed lots of food in this country, so we've never ever faced a food shortage. The worst is yet to come." Leading industry sources are worried about food shortages. Experts say more grocery hoarding may come as disruptions push America's food supply "near its breaking point". As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever. If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to be hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like... Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired... Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick... Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished... Well, no need to worry anymore... Obviously, waiting on the government for a handout in a disaster just isn't an option. And we were completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of the best-selling . Currently the 4Patriots Survival Food Kits are flying off the shelves because: 4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value. This is not ordinary food. This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that helps keep you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high-quality survival food without gross fillers or weird "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are handpacked right in a family-owned facility in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are. There's no fancy packaging, it's sturdy, triple-layer stuff and can stand up to most of the crazy things that happen in a crisis. This food is designed to last for 25 years , so you have complete peace of mind for the long term. And they're using compact kits so you can store them anywhere in your house without any extra hassle. They're sturdy, water-resistant and stack easily. And extremely covert too. You can make these meals in less than 20 minutes. Just add boiling water, simmer, and serve. Customers rave about the delicious flavor of this food - it doesn't taste like "survival food." And you get a whole slew of choices for breakfast, lunch and dinner so you don't get stuck eating the same thing day-in and day-out. You get an easy, no nonsense monthly payment plan with no interest! And that's not all, because... FREE Bonus #1: because they are so popular and a true foundation for your preparedness plan, they're going to give you 2 of their popular 72-Hour Survival Food Kits when you get your 3-Month Kit today. FREE Bonus #4: You'll also get an Exclusive Ultimate Survival Digital Library. With these 4 digital books, you'll have the information and tips to help you prepare for an emergency. FREE Bonus #5: You also get their Digital Meal Planning & Recipe Guide. Inside, you'll find easy ways to whip up delicious meals you'd be proud to serve your kids, and you'll get this brand NEW report for FREE. FREE Bonus #6: You also get Freedom Joe's Survival Coffee. Rich, aromatic coffee designed to last 25 years. Coffee is one of the most in-demand items when the "you-know-what" hits the fan. Stay alert when the going gets tough with a cup of premium survival coffee from 100% pure Arabica beans. You get 30 servings of delicious, aromatic survival coffee added to your Kit. FREE Bonus #7: You also get Bugle Boy Survival Cocoa. Warm up with each cup of chocolatey goodness that is sure to satisfy the young and the young at heart. With your Survival Cocoa Kits, you'll have the satisfying comfort of a steaming cup of cocoa when you and your loved ones need it most. You'll get 14 servings of this taste-tested hot cocoa FREE for arming yourself with survival food. But we're still not done, because you also get... FREE Bonus #8: You also get $25 OFF your next purchase. This is FREE money in the bank for you. You get $25 off any future purchase of $100 or more. Use it to get whatever you need to round out your preparedness plan... best-selling survival food, solar gadgets and so much more! It's completely up to you. That's what we call an incredible deal. But we want to sweeten the pot. So when you order your 3-Month Survival Food Kit today, you also get... FREE Bonus #9: You get FREE Shipping and Handling on your entire order! It's not cheap to ship 688 servings of food in two totes (plus all the FREE gifts you're getting). But you deserve it for becoming a loyal customer. And frankly, we want to do it for you. Isn't that great? The best part is... You'll have the peace of mind and security that comes from having your very own survival food stockpile. And everyone from former Navy SEALs to middle-American grandmas are singing its praises. You need to get 'er done today. Why? Hakeem Jeffries is the Democratic Leader of the U.S. House of Representatives. Like many of us, Hakeem was raised by a working-class family; His mom was a social worker and his dad was a substance abuse counselor.

| Peter,

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: We've already written to you about the most important race this year—for the open seat on Wisconsin’s State Supreme Court—which may determine whether we remain a democracy. But this NEW EXPOSE on the right wing extremist candidate, Dan Kelly, makes the danger all too clear.
body:
April 4th election
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3a958f81-7285-44d9-89bf-257d1b42e233/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **_We've written to you about the most important race this year--which may determine whether we remain a democracy. But a NEW EXPOSE on right wing nut, Dan Kelly, makes the danger all too clear._** _As you’ve probably heard, Wisconsin has an election on April 4th, for Supreme Court,_ and this one race will determine if there's a progressive Democratic majority or insane MAGA Republican majority on The Court.__ _Progressive Janet Protasiewicz would join 3 liberal colleagues for a 4-3 Democratic majority. They'll overturn the cruel abortion ban that made millions of women state property and block Trump or DeSantis henchmen from stealing Wisconsin's electoral votes in 2024, as Trump attempted to do in 2020._ [**_Will you join Blue Amp in making the maximum effort to ensure we never find out how dangerous Dan Kelly could be, by electing progressive champion Janet Protasiewicz April 4th by giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te4703313-96be-4d73-a8da-3cde441db8eb/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

---
| **_It's hard to put into words the menace posed by abortion-hating, Trump-endorsed lunatic, Dan Kelly, if he wins. Yet, we don't have to, as it's made crystal clear in this explosive expose (see image below) by the Milwaukee Journal Sentinel on Kelly's moral sickness:_** [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tebba3246-e722-4fc6-ac28-29d2d71429d1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **This degenerate, Kelly, is unfit to be local dog catcher, much less a man who decides whether Donald or DeSantis can steal an election. ** [**_Will you join Blue Amp in making the maximum effort to ensure we never find out how bad he could be, by electing progressive champion Janet Protasiewicz April 4th by giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc2b68cf4-4f15-4ec7-afb0-71020d77b254/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Thank you for stopping this evil in its tracks and saving our democracy._ Cliff

| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T754c3c33-ab04-4832-ab29-162b0eae84a0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

body:
Becca is calling out corporate greed

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60751330/398098967/966991095?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOTE2YjA5Yy1kOWNiLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cwTfGVgRosO2QStZ1GSwS06Ow-czkdP5wgG-4OA7EtY=&emci=cbb71aae-65ca-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=d916b09c-d9cb-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=43402272) | Peter, Becca is using her position on the House Oversight Committee to call out corporate greed. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60751331/398098968/539210454?refcode=E20721-20230326-EOQCorporateGreed-graphic-DeadlineEOM-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=27&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOTE2YjA5Yy1kOWNiLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cwTfGVgRosO2QStZ1GSwS06Ow-czkdP5wgG-4OA7EtY=) Clear evidence shows that record price hikes and skyrocketing profit margins have DRIVEN inflation and kept prices high on things like eggs, gasoline, and everyday goods. In her latest Oversight Committee hearing, **Becca went toe-to-toe with corporate executives to call out their attempts to use inflation as an excuse to jack up prices and shake down the American people – _and we need to help her keep up the pressure. _** Becca is taking on the status quo and powerful special interests in Washington – and they’re already pushing back against her. Our movement will only succeed if we're able to come together and grow the power of progressive voices in Congress like Becca. clean_body: Becca is calling out corporate greed | | Peter, Becca is using her position on the House Oversight Committee to call out corporate greed. = Clear evidence shows that record price hikes and skyrocketing profit margins have DRIVEN inflation and kept prices high on things like eggs, gasoline, and everyday goods. In her latest Oversight Committee hearing, Becca went toe-to-toe with corporate executives to call out their attempts to use inflation as an excuse to jack up prices and shake down the American people – and we need to help her keep up the pressure. Becca is taking on the status quo and powerful special interests in Washington – and they’re already pushing back against her. Our movement will only succeed if we're able to come together and grow the power of progressive voices in Congress like Becca. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Instead of asking Vermonters to continue paying high prices for gasoline, food, and other basic necessities, Becca is demanding that large, profitable corporations make less money. name: Ruben Gallego
subject: Growing up poor, this country took a chance on me. Now I am asking for you to take a chance on this campaign.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
The things I want in life are not exotic. I think most people feel the same way.
#

Peter -
The things I want in life are not exotic. I think most people feel the same way.
I want loving relationships with my family. I want to help my constituents, and I want an America that lives up to its ideals.
Growing up poor, this country took a chance on me.
I took advantage of the things Democrats championed and the people of our country provided: Pell Grants and school lunch programs, to name just two.
Those helping hands gave me (and people like me) a debt of gratitude I worked to pay back through service — first in the Marines, and now in Congress.
The truth is, Senator Sinema has been an advocate for the rich and powerful in the Senate.
But those folks have enough advocates there.
It’s the people deciding between groceries and utilities who need help.
That’s why I am running.
But if we’re going to win this race, it is going to take a historic grassroots effort. And this week’s FEC deadline is such a critical marker in our journey.
I couldn’t get to where I am in life without help. And I can’t win this race either. It’s going to take all of us to win. So I am asking:
[**Can I count on you to contribute $3 to our Senate campaign before our first FEC fundraising deadline comes to a close in just a few days? I would not be asking if it was not so terribly important.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-mar23.PJzORo&refcode=em230326-1-30&t=1&akid=493%2E734936%2EYh_krM)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[CONTRIBUTE $3](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1044?c0=ruben-em-mar23.68dfDh&amount=3&refcode=em230326-1-30&t=2&akid=493%2E734936%2EYh_krM)**
---
****
| **[CONTRIBUTE MORE](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1044?c0=ruben-em-mar23.68dfDh&refcode=em230326-1-30&t=3&akid=493%2E734936%2EYh_krM)**
---
****
Thank you,
Ruben

Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails like this are a critical tool for our campaign's fundraising and organizing efforts, but if you need to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=493%2E734936%2EYh_krM). If you would like to support Ruben's campaign for Senate, please consider [making a donation today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruben-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=5&refcode2=493_734936_Yh_krM&akid=493%2E734936%2EYh_krM)

name: Mandela Barnes
subject: Wisconsin needs Judge Janet
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC
body:
#
Friends — I am going to be straightforward. I’m reaching out to explain why I’m supporting Judge Janet Protasiewicz today and am asking you to split a contribution between her campaign for the Wisconsin Supreme Court and The Long Run.
**If you already know the stakes of this race and that’s all you need to hear, please use this link to split a contribution:**
[**https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/SupportJudgeJanet](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-protasiewicz-split.f-ImYh&refcode=em230326-1-t1&t=1&akid=4284%2E196590%2ED-v9-R)
With just 9 days until the Election, it’s time to get all hands on deck to support Judge Janet, because the alternative is unimaginable and disastrous for Wisconsin.
Wisconsinites deserve a court of law that protects the rights of its citizens and justices that focus on upholding the law — not politicians in robes. Judge Janet Protasiewicz is the common sense candidate that will do just that — she will protect fundamental freedoms like abortion access and voting rights, and return fairness and impartiality to the Wisconsin Supreme Court.
The alternative? Anti-abortion, election-denier, MAGA candidate Dan Kelly. So _we need Judge Janet on the Court._
While I work to get out the vote across Wisconsin, I am asking for your support in helping Judge Janet fight against right-wing super PAC attack ads in the final stretch of this race.
[**Can you please split a contribution between Judge Janet Protasiewicz’s campaign for Wisconsin Supreme Court and The Long Run? With just 9 days until the election, we are counting on grassroots supporters like you to step up in support of Janet.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-protasiewicz-split.f-ImYh&refcode=em230326-1-t1&t=2&akid=4284%2E196590%2ED-v9-R)

[Express Donate: $250](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1266?c0=longrunpac-em-protasiewicz-split.tDBSiQ&refcode=em230326-1-t1&t=25&akid=4284%2E196590%2ED-v9-R)

name: Team Beshear
subject: Here's what you need to know about the KY Governor's Race:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR
body:
Can we count on your support? Peter,

During an election year, there are some things we can't know for sure. Like how much Andy's opponents will raise and spend, who will win the Republican nomination, and who will turn out to vote on November 7. _**But here's what we do know:**_
* **The 2023 race for governor here in Kentucky will be the most competitive election in the whole country.** Andy has 12 Republican opponents, one of whom is a self-funded billionaire who has already spent over $1 million on TV ads.

* **Outside money is going to flood Kentucky to attack Andy.** Money has begun to flow into our Commonwealth, as it did in 2019. And outside groups are already spending millions of dollars to bolster Andy's opponents.

* **Kentucky's progress is on the line.** Andy's administration has made record progress for Kentucky — setting all-time highs for economic development and job growth, keeping unemployment low and workforce participation high, all while maintaining a fiscally responsible budget.

Our team is working around the clock to ensure Andy has the resources to win in November. As we approach the first quarterly filing deadline of the year, we want to know if you're on board. clean_body: Can we count on your support? Peter, During an election year, there are some things we can't know for sure. Like how much Andy's opponents will raise and spend, who will win the Republican nomination, and who will turn out to vote on November 7. But here's what we do know: The 2023 race for governor here in Kentucky will be the most competitive election in the whole country. Andy has 12 Republican opponents, one of whom is a self-funded billionaire who has already spent over $1 million on TV ads. Outside money is going to flood Kentucky to attack Andy. Money has begun to flow into our Commonwealth, as it did in 2019. And outside groups are already spending millions of dollars to bolster Andy's opponents. Kentucky's progress is on the line. Andy's administration has made record progress for Kentucky — setting all-time highs for economic development and job growth, keeping unemployment low and workforce participation high, all while maintaining a fiscally responsible budget. Our team is working around the clock to ensure Andy has the resources to win in November. clean_body: Help us defend election integrity against the radical Left. | Friend, Our elections are under attack from radical Left-wing activists. A liberal group mailed pre-filled absentee ballots out to thousands of Wisconsinites with wrong and false information after posing as a voter resource group. This is the same group backing radical liberal Judge Protasiewicz for Wisconsin’s Supreme Court. We can’t allow a judge supported by those threatening the security and integrity of our elections to win this critical election. Just the other day, Protasiewicz preached to voters that she would be a defender of democracy and warned them of the dangers of electing Justice Kelly. Yet some of her biggest supporters are those that are trying to destroy and dismantle the election process and interfere to ensure their “woke” agenda comes to fruition. This is the kind of corruption and dishonesty that Justice Kelly is up against and he needs our help in these final 9 days to secure this critical win. - Thank you, Wisconsin Republicans Paid for by the Republican Party of Wisconsin. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. www.wisgop.org 148 E Johnson Street, Madison, WI 53703

name: Team Baldwin
subject: Politico: “Republicans are looking for Senate candidates who are filthy rich”
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1001&akid=80%2E35263%2EtQajRU ]TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE

Check out this headline, Peter:

Republicans are looking for Senate candidates who are filthy rich
– Politico
March 22, 2023

As you know, Tammy has been a tireless champion for Wisconsin families and
a leader in the Senate. She’s fought for access to affordable health care,
equal rights for all, and economic opportunities for working families. But
now, her Senate seat is at risk.

Republicans are hard at work recruiting wealthy self-funders to run in key
Senate races nationwide, including right here in Wisconsin. They know that
Democrats’ grassroots support is insurmountable, so they’re resorting to
recruiting candidates who have millions of dollars to spare on a campaign.

So far, the GOP field of Tammy's potential opponents is varied, but they
all have this in common: they don't represent Wisconsin values. Senate
Republicans can have their pick of wealthy self-funders, extreme Trump
loyalists, and conspiracy theorists, but they all lack Tammy's ability to
overcome partisan games and deliver the results Wisconsinites need.

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-march2023.nl-AYM&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20230326_AM1_V1_S1&t=1004&akid=80%2E35263%2EtQajRU ]That's why we’re asking for your help to ensure that Tammy has the
resources to win re-election and continue to fight for Wisconsin families.

name: Taeka, Finance at Team Cori
subject: Good news and bad news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
body:
I have good news and bad news.
#
Peter, sorry to interrupt your Sunday, but I have good news and bad news.
**First, the good news:** When we reached out earlier this week about our upcoming end-of-quarter fundraising deadline, dozens of supporters from across the country chipped in what they could to help bring us closer to meeting that goal.
It's more clear than ever that in order to transform our politics and finally address the crises everyday people are facing, we need Cori in Congress. That belief in knowing we can make this country better for _all_ of us is what keeps Cori, our supporters, and our movement going.
**Now, the bad news:** We’re still thousands of dollars away from reaching our fundraising goal — _and the deadline is just five days away._
Peter, in order to keep Cori on the frontlines of our movement, we need to have a strong showing on our FEC fundraising report. Being able to report that we met our goal shows both our opponents and our supporters that Team Cori is here to stay — and we’re just going to get stronger.
[**With that said, I need to ask: Can you make a $5 donation to show your support for Cori and our movement today?**](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230326.2ebPWv&amount=5&refcode=em20230326-2397&t=1&akid=2397%2E1082990%2E4loF6Y)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230326.2ebPWv&amount=5&refcode=em20230326-2397&t=20&akid=2397%2E1082990%2E4loF6Y)**
The harsh truth is that Republican super PACs and the far-right are already raising millions from right-wing mega-donors so they can come after Cori and weaken our progressive coalition.
We might not have unlimited funds at our disposal like they do, but we have something even better — this grassroots team. And at the end of the day, we have the message that motivates our supporters and Cori has the track record of a dedicated representative.
**[Your support today will help us continue to grow and strengthen our coalition in the months to come. Please, consider making a donation of $5 today.](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230326.2ebPWv&amount=5&refcode=em20230326-2397&t=21&akid=2397%2E1082990%2E4loF6Y)**
Thank you for your support, and enjoy the rest of your weekend.
—Taeka, Finance
Team Cori

**[Contribute ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cori-em-20230326?refcode=em20230326-2397-footer&t=22&refcode2=2397_1082990_4loF6Y&akid=2397%2E1082990%2E4loF6Y) **
---
Follow us on **[Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/VoteCoriBush/)** , **[Twitter](https://twitter.com/CoriBush)** , **[Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/coribush/)** , and **[visit our website](https://coribush.org/)**. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Mail us: Cori Bush for Congress, 75 North Oaks Plaza, St. Louis, MO 63121.

name: Courier Newsroom
subject: AI has entered the chat…
body:
We’ll admit, we thought they were real at first.
# [](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/83?t=1&akid=768%2E120351%2EagVign)
_AI has entered the chat..._
Peter, earlier this week we sent you a message about Trump’s rumored arrest — rooted in misinformation that Trump himself created and spread widely by the mainstream media.
**Unsurprisingly, social media picked up on this bad information**** _fast_****.** That’s when the deepfake images started circulating...
[](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/3556?refcode=em-20230326&t=2&akid=768%2E120351%2EagVign)
Very realistic looking pictures of Trump being carried off by police spread like wildfire across the internet. **The only (very big) issue: they weren’t real.**
Instead, they were created with just a few keystrokes and clicks through artificial intelligence software.
As AI tools and chatbots make it even easier to generate and share seriously misleading information, our work to deliver trusted local news has never been more important.
[**Our dedicated news teams post and publish their fact-based news pieces in the same online spaces where this kind of bad information thrives — and nip false claims like this in the bud. This new AI technology grows more popular every day, so it’s clear our reporters have their work cut out for them. Will you play a critical role in our fight against bad information by chipping in $5 now?**](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/3556?refcode=em-20230326&t=3&akid=768%2E120351%2EagVign)
**[Chip in $5 »](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/3556?refcode=em-20230326&t=4&akid=768%2E120351%2EagVign)**
Thank you,
Courier Newsroom

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Let’s go back to the beginning
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Let’s rewind: It’s 2016. Bernie Sanders shocked the establishment and
mounted a historic challenge for the Democratic nomination. And then — the
Democratic establishment lost against Trump.

It was clear that the party insiders and political machine could not be
trusted to protect our democracy or fight for our people. We needed a new
path forward.

So we built it ourselves. Justice Democrats was formed by people who gave
our all to the progressive movement Bernie brought together and we’re
ready to create the infrastructure to keep the momentum going for years to
come.

We set out to change Congress by recruiting and electing a diverse slate
of working people who share real-life experiences with the communities
they represent. And we have, thanks to support from thousands of people
like you who share our vision.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/132179?refcode=em20230326-28136&t=1001&akid=28136%2E1203867%2EkoTTGc ]We’re ready to do it all again, but our work hinges on donations we
receive from emails like this one. So we’re humbly asking: Will you donate
$3 to help us reach our critical $250,000 end-of-quarter
goal?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/132179?refcode=em20230326-28136&t=1020&akid=28136%2E1203867%2EkoTTGc ]Contribute $3

Our mission is simple. But when our politics has been consumed by
corporate money, elections favor entrenched incumbents, and far-right
groups like AIPAC are laser-focused on taking our candidates down, it
takes an incredible amount of work just to get regular, working people
elected to Congress.

That needs to change, and we will change it — but right now, we still need
major resources to pull off the scale of work we have to do to find AND
elect new Justice Democrats.

It’s our job to think about the long-term, which is why we’ve already
started our 2024 candidate recruitment. Planning this far in advance gives
us the time to go deep into communities to find our future leaders — that
can’t be rushed. It’s too important.

That’s why when we say your donation today makes a difference, we truly
mean it. Your support allows us to really invest in finding our candidates
right now.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/132179?refcode=em20230326-28136&t=1021&akid=28136%2E1203867%2EkoTTGc ]So what do you say,
Peter? Whether it’s $5 or $250,
every donation helps — can we count on yours today?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/132179?refcode=em20230326-28136&t=1022&akid=28136%2E1203867%2EkoTTGc ]Contribute $3

We’re here for the long-term, and we hope you are too. Thank you for your
support.

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1023&akid=28136%2E1203867%2EkoTTGc ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1024&akid=28136%2E1203867%2EkoTTGc ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20230326-28136-footer&t=1025&refcode2=28136_1203867_koTTGc&akid=28136%2E1203867%2EkoTTGc

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1026&akid=28136%2E1203867%2EkoTTGc

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

That needs to change, and we will change it — but right now, we still need major resources to pull off the scale of work we have to do to find AND elect new Justice Democrats. It’s our job to think about the long-term, which is why we’ve already started our 2024 candidate recruitment. Planning this far in advance gives us the time to go deep into communities to find our future leaders — that can’t be rushed. It’s too important. That’s why when we say your donation today makes a difference, we truly mean it. Your support allows us to really invest in finding our candidates right now. [ ]So what do you say, Peter? Whether it’s $5 or $250, every donation helps — can we count on yours today? [ ]Contribute $3 We’re here for the long-term, and we hope you are too. Thank you for your support. In solidarity, Justice Democrats Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank [ ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong. Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the [ ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department. Contribute to Justice Democrats:

Friend, I care deeply about my neighbors and the residents of my district, which is why I hosted a recent town hall on how we can hold greedy utility companies accountable and ensure reliable and affordable utilities for everyone. **But a right-wing operative attempted to sow hate and division by targeting me and interrupting our town hall. He even shouted that I should “go back to Palestine.”** I was born and raised in Detroit, but racist xenophobes like Donald Trump have called for me to “go back” to another country. This is personal for me. **As the only Palestinian-American in Congress, I regularly face attacks about my heritage and my defense of Palestinian human rights.** **But I will not be silenced.** Palestinians deserve human dignity, as do we all. I will keep fighting for human rights in my district, in Palestine, and around the world. [**Will you chip in $5 or more today to have my back in the face of xenophobic, anti-Palestinian attacks? Friend,
Recently, a right-wing operative targeted me at a town hall I hosted in my district about the massive power outages our communities have experienced. **He shouted at me to “Go back to Palestine.”**
Our town hall brought together communities across our district who are eager to work together for reliable and affordable utilities for their families and neighbors. But we were interrupted by an attempt to sow hate and division.
**This attack was hurtful, reminding me of Trump’s calls for me and my Squad sisters to “go back” to where we came from -- even though I was born and raised in Detroit.** I’m from here, I belong here, and I’m here to stay.

**I am the proud daughter of Palestinian immigrants and the granddaughter of a loving grandmother who’s still living in occupied Palestine.**

During my first term in Congress, I tried to visit my grandmother and meet with human rights groups in Palestine. But the Israeli government barred me from entering. After international outcry, the government made my ability to visit my family contingent upon my signing a letter that I would only see my family, and in return, not shed light on the injustices happening in Israel. But I will not be silenced.
Visiting my grandmother under such oppressive conditions meant to humiliate me would break my grandmother's heart, so I decided not to go. I was devastated. And unfortunately, many Palestinians, Arabs, and Muslims are regularly blocked from going to (or “back to”) Palestine.
Israel’s apartheid government also blocks Palestinians from traveling. I have been through checkpoints with my grandmother in the occupied West Bank as the Israeli military interrogates her, simply for trying to seek services such as healthcare.
**This is personal for me. As the only Palestinian-American in Congress, I regularly face attacks for my defense of Palestinian human rights -- including from my fellow members of Congress.**
Palestinians deserve human dignity, as do we all. I will keep fighting for human rights in my district, in Palestine, and around the world.
[**Please chip in what you can afford today to show that we will not let hate divide us. clean_body: I am the proud daughter of Palestinian immigrants and the granddaughter of a loving grandmother who’s still living in occupied Palestine. | | | Friend, I care deeply about my neighbors and the residents of my district, which is why I hosted a recent town hall on how we can hold greedy utility companies accountable and ensure reliable and affordable utilities for everyone. But a right-wing operative attempted to sow hate and division by targeting me and interrupting our town hall. He even shouted that I should “go back to Palestine.” I was born and raised in Detroit, but racist xenophobes like Donald Trump have called for me to “go back” to another country. This is personal for me. As the only Palestinian-American in Congress, I regularly face attacks about my heritage and my defense of Palestinian human rights. But I will not be silenced. Palestinians deserve human dignity, as do we all. I will keep fighting for human rights in my district, in Palestine, and around the world. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | Thank you so much. Please feel free to read yesterday’s email for more information, including about what happened when I tried to visit my grandmother in Palestine. In solidarity, Rashida \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Rashida Tlaib** Date: Sat, Mar 25, 2023 Subject: I will not back down amidst attempts to silence me and others in the movement for Palestinian rights. To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Friend, Recently, a right-wing operative targeted me at a town hall I hosted in my district about the massive power outages our communities have experienced. He shouted at me to “Go back to Palestine.” Our town hall brought together communities across our district who are eager to work together for reliable and affordable utilities for their families and neighbors. But we were interrupted by an attempt to sow hate and division. This attack was hurtful, reminding me of Trump’s calls for me and my Squad sisters to “go back” to where we came from -- even though I was born and raised in Detroit. I’m from here, I belong here, and I’m here to stay. I will never back down. I am going to outwork the hate and keep pushing forward against those that promote racism and division. I am the proud daughter of Palestinian immigrants and the granddaughter of a loving grandmother who’s still living in occupied Palestine. During my first term in Congress, I tried to visit my grandmother and meet with human rights groups in Palestine. But the Israeli government barred me from entering. After international outcry, the government made my ability to visit my family contingent upon my signing a letter that I would only see my family, and in return, not shed light on the injustices happening in Israel. But I will not be silenced. Visiting my grandmother under such oppressive conditions meant to humiliate me would break my grandmother's heart, so I decided not to go. I was devastated. And unfortunately, many Palestinians, Arabs, and Muslims are regularly blocked from going to (or “back to”) Palestine. Israel’s apartheid government also blocks Palestinians from traveling. I have been through checkpoints with my grandmother in the occupied West Bank as the Israeli military interrogates her, simply for trying to seek services such as healthcare. This is personal for me. As the only Palestinian-American in Congress, I regularly face attacks for my defense of Palestinian human rights -- including from my fellow members of Congress. Palestinians deserve human dignity, as do we all. I will keep fighting for human rights in my district, in Palestine, and around the world. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | Thank you for being by my side. name: Ronny Jackson
subject: I’m sure you’ve gotten a ton of messages about the arrest of President Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Texans for Ronny Jackson
body:
| | **I 'm sure you've gotten a ton of messages about the arrest of President Trump, but this one doesn't require your money, your number, or your email.**
---
This isn't one of those emails.
This is Congressman Ronny Jackson.
I was President Trump's White House physician, and now, I'm proudly his strongest ally in the House.
Listen, I'm sure your email has been blowing up with unsolicited messages about Trump's potential arrest.
I'm sure you've gotten messages from random organizations you've never heard of before.
**And I 'm positive you've gotten emails from Swamp Creature "Republicans" who claim to be on Trump's side, but behind closed doors secretly want him to rot away in a prison cell.**
I get these emails too, but this one is different.
As Trump's top ally in the House, I speak with him often - very, very often.
[**So I asked my team to make a page where President Trump 's top supporters can send him their own personal message as he faces the biggest political Witch Hunt in American history.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62480010:6rDdb9GN6:m:1:3365131770:32F1A901C02D76592708F413B5CDD462:r)
And again, this doesn't require your money, your number, or your email.
| [ **SEND A MESSAGE TO TRUMP** ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62480010:6rDdb9GN6:m:1:3365131770:32F1A901C02D76592708F413B5CDD462:r)
---
But just a fair warning, **responses will be cut off at midnight tonight.**
My team needs time to organize them before President Trump lands in my home state of Texas for his FIRST rally since announcing his candidacy.
So I'm humbly asking:[ **Please send your message to President Trump today.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62480010:6rDdb9GN6:m:1:3365131770:32F1A901C02D76592708F413B5CDD462:r)
I know how much he loves his supporters
Thank you & God Bless,
Ronny Jackson
