name: Lucas Kunce
subject: The Missouri I know
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
[1]Lucas Kunce for U.S. Senate

Peter — Josh Hawley doesn’t know
the Missouri I know.

Before I ask you to [ https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/29868?refcode=em20230326-2878&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=2878%2E614464%2EVJFnuz ]add a donation of any amount before our first major
FEC fundraising deadline later this week, let me show you a few reasons
why:

On the left is Joshua Hawley. While his banker daddy was sending him to a
fancy prep school miles from his hometown, my family and I were relying on
our neighbors to survive bankruptcy and medical bills in mid-Missouri — in
a community where people took care of each other. That’s us on the right.

[ https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/29868?refcode=em20230326-2878&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=2878%2E614464%2EVJFnuz ]On left: Photo of young Joshua Hawley. On right: Photo of Lucas and
members of his family in his old neighborhood.

When Hawley graduated from law school, he joined one of the world’s most
elite corporate law firms. I joined the Marine Corps to pay back the
community in Missouri that took care of me and my family. And when he was
climbing the ladder to become another corrupt politician, I was serving my
country — and then working to prevent the pointless overseas wars that
make us less safe.

[ https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/29868?refcode=em20230326-2878&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=2878%2E614464%2EVJFnuz ]On left: Missouri Independent headline about Hawley's knowingly
violating transparency laws as during his time as Attorney General to
benefit his 2018 Senate campaign. On right: Photo of Lucas during his
service in the U.S. Marine Corps

While Josh Hawley aligned himself with the same giant corporations who’ve
spent decades attacking Missouri workers and shipping away our jobs, I’ve
been fighting to take back power for American workers and small
businesses.

[ https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/29868?refcode=em20230326-2878&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1004&akid=2878%2E614464%2EVJFnuz ]On left: Labor Tribune headline that reads 'Hawley has been a vocal
supporter of implementing Right-to-Work in Missouri. On right: HuffPost
headline that reads 'Lucas Kunce, a crusader against corporate
consolidation.'

And when Hawley voted against relief for veterans like me who were exposed
to toxic burn pits, I stood up alongside thousands of veterans to hold him
accountable.

[ https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/29868?refcode=em20230326-2878&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1005&akid=2878%2E614464%2EVJFnuz ]On left: YahooNews headline that reads 'Blunt, Hawley vote to stall
bill expanding health care for veterans exposed to burn pits.' On right:
FoxNews headline that reads 'I was exposed to toxic burn pits in Iraq;
Republicans turned their backs on veterans like me.'

The Missouri I grew up in taught us to take care of one another. To do
your duty. To serve and sacrifice for your fellow Missourians.

Josh Hawley doesn’t know that Missouri — and on January 6th, 2021, he
showed us the only thing he’s learned is how to be a fraud and a coward.

[ https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/29868?refcode=em20230326-2878&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1006&akid=2878%2E614464%2EVJFnuz ]On left: Photo of Josh Hawley raising his fist outside the Capitol on
January 6, 2021. On right: Screengrab of video of Josh Hawley fleeing
Capitol on January 6.

Josh Hawley hasn't just abandoned our state and our values. He's
embarrassed himself and all of Missouri. And embarrassing Missouri...
That’s something I can't let go.

Missourians deserve a U.S. Senator who’s willing and able to fight for
them — and unlike Josh, I'm ready to serve. If you’re ready to help us
make sure every Missouri voter knows it before they vote on Election Day,
I need your help:

[ https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/29868?refcode=em20230326-2878&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1007&akid=2878%2E614464%2EVJFnuz ]Will you chip in any amount toward our end-of-quarter goal right now so
we can start this campaign off strong and get our message in front of
voters? Flipping this U.S. Senate seat will only be possible if we build a
powerful grassroots movement, and early support from real people like you
is the best way we can do it.

If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your
contribution instantly:

[ https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/29869?refcode=em20230326-2878&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=1008&akid=2878%2E614464%2EVJFnuz ]Contribute $10
[ https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/29869?refcode=em20230326-2878&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=1009&akid=2878%2E614464%2EVJFnuz ]Contribute $25
[ https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/29869?refcode=em20230326-2878&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=1010&akid=2878%2E614464%2EVJFnuz ]Contribute $30
[ https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/29869?refcode=em20230326-2878&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=1011&akid=2878%2E614464%2EVJFnuz ]Contribute $50
[ https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/29869?refcode=em20230326-2878&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=1012&akid=2878%2E614464%2EVJFnuz ]Contribute $100
[ https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/29869?refcode=em20230326-2878&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=1013&akid=2878%2E614464%2EVJFnuz ]Contribute $250
[ https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/29868?refcode=em20230326-2878&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1014&akid=2878%2E614464%2EVJFnuz ]Give another amount

If we keep working together, we can take back power for working
Missourians and everyday people all across the country.

Thanks for helping us get it done,

— Lucas Kunce

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.lucaskunce.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1015&akid=2878%2E614464%2EVJFnuz

Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri.

Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

name: Giffords
subject: Will you add your name today to reject Stand Your Ground laws?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
It’s time to repeal Stand Your Ground laws.
#

Friends -
We’d like to take a moment today to talk about the dangers of “Stand Your Ground” laws.
Stand Your Ground laws allow a person to use deadly force in public, even if they know they could safely avoid the need for violence by stepping away—aka “retreating”—from the incident.
The majority of US states have Stand Your Ground laws, even though there is research to show that these laws encourage the escalation of violence in everyday conflicts.
Florida was one of the first states to implement Stand Your Ground laws, and it led to a 24% increase in firearm-related homicides in the state. Overall, about fifty people across the US are killed each month due to Stand Your Ground laws.
Additionally, Stand Your Ground laws disproportionately harm our nation’s Black and Brown communities. This came to national attention in 2012 after 17-year-old Trayvon Martin was shot and killed.
In states with Stand Your Ground laws, a white person is 350% more likely to go free for killing a Black person than a white person.
It’s time to repeal Stand Your Ground laws. They create unnecessary violence, lead to increases in homicide rates, and perpetuate systemic racism.
[**Will you sign on to our petition today and join us in calling on Congress to take action to repeal these dangerous laws at the federal level?**](https://go.giffords.org/signup/giffords_em_sygpetition_mar23/?source=em230326-1-30&refcode2=4790.3935704.s_TTkp&akid=4790%2E3935704%2Es_TTkp)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://go.giffords.org/signup/giffords_em_sygpetition_mar23/?source=em230326-1-30&refcode2=4790.3935704.s_TTkp&akid=4790%2E3935704%2Es_TTkp)**
Thank you for using your voice.
\- The team at Giffords

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1&akid=4790%2E3935704%2Es_TTkp) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

Stand Your Ground laws allow a person to use deadly force in public, even if they know they could safely avoid the need for violence by stepping away—aka “retreating”—from the incident. The majority of US states have Stand Your Ground laws, even though there is research to show that these laws encourage the escalation of violence in everyday conflicts. Florida was one of the first states to implement Stand Your Ground laws, and it led to a 24% increase in firearm-related homicides in the state. Overall, about fifty people across the US are killed each month due to Stand Your Ground laws. Additionally, Stand Your Ground laws disproportionately harm our nation’s Black and Brown communities. This came to national attention in 2012 after 17-year-old Trayvon Martin was shot and killed. In states with Stand Your Ground laws, a white person is 350% more likely to go free for killing a Black person than a white person. It’s time to repeal Stand Your Ground laws. They create unnecessary violence, lead to increases in homicide rates, and perpetuate systemic racism. Thank you for using your voice. \- The team at Giffords Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org

name: Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.

This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=d2428b525efa4c65bd95963ba17ba380&_e=TvsUHTQhQILk01iuSu_WuFBdARXr7Q-e2MC0ARtAu2FyjkgCoFThQN9MWbT1zex6PLtulWIaedhnorfumJydvlaStxi3712USZvS4QgaKwt-skowSO2YzDbRx3E66IPozwAd-d71pN5d45OIP9k_Ay20soj5QR2cAsqmvJtZfJ2LcHQkYL1pKsCzEGKZ23lAiIYQ-7_eD_KnDKoNoP1rfjPexiU-2tqAQxqiuHp7NQQvpXL0xMZoWtcrkPIncSP87dv33Gigyo6M0ceMCkhWBv9oQS3QwGDlL8kz6EwBDq7Z4F3xwTp53wLc3h9-zPTCZKcBe68nwt9HT4pElojItw1l9gOgQuQB0iTKCKvzVpHZDvyAQlBMefP0jEt5drLp9Pl8B0kPv6061vYdlq_PoQ%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we're losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled "The Second World Wars." Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict's diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=d2428b525efa4c65bd95963ba17ba380&_e=TvsUHTQhQILk01iuSu_WuFBdARXr7Q-e2MC0ARtAu2FyjkgCoFThQN9MWbT1zex6PLtulWIaedhnorfumJydvlaStxi3712USZvS4QgaKwt-skowSO2YzDbRx3E66IPozwAd-d71pN5d45OIP9k_Ay20soj5QR2cAsqmvJtZfJ2LcHQkYL1pKsCzEGKZ23lAiIYQ-7_eD_KnDKoNoP1rfjPexiU-2tqAQxqiuHp7NQQvpXL0xMZoWtcrkPIncSP8AdFMK1Y5pnSJlYgbnGKsOqIQJ3HiMFDRrAsRzlQb-wcutWdJ_XrORg0UMy9jptTCluIxKvIVhf1hd7NQQN1qIIg3gIwjN4co8rCf-LFXcOunxgV5xp3wQh4l-3EB0vZG4l3biJjUCZJf7PtgQl6QCQ%3D%3D) If you'd like to secure a DVD set before they're all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here's a secure link to reserve your copy of "**The Second World Wars** " on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=d2428b525efa4c65bd95963ba17ba380&_e=TvsUHTQhQILk01iuSu_WuFBdARXr7Q-e2MC0ARtAu2FyjkgCoFThQN9MWbT1zex6PLtulWIaedhnorfumJydvlaStxi3712USZvS4QgaKwt-skowSO2YzDbRx3E66IPozwAd-d71pN5d45OIP9k_Ay20soj5QR2cAsqmvJtZfJ2LcHQkYL1pKsCzEGKZ23lAiIYQ-7_eD_KnDKoNoP1rfjPexiU-2tqAQxqiuHp7NQQvpXL0xMZoWtcrkPIncSP8O5FcyTCVm-h_LQz-vs-BTW-92VKDrArQ23cX4KrxLwb3DyUTzruFh_P08kUdlh1Y9keq0IP3syrhOjExe61wuUMFlvEAgauWdOP5SnDBx9aJOPL8i2J07Je91VU4CSIDd0uyvzFGxIJXX2blk0cKRg%3D%3D)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, '09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College

body:

clean_body: | | | | Peter – After starting off the year with a Speaker election spectacle not seen since the mid-nineteenth century, the extremists in the Republican House majority have spent these past three months trying to ban picture books, showboating for Fox News, and calling for a national divorce. And Kevin McCarthy is playing right along with it. This is what we are up against in 2024. Unserious people doing serious jobs. Now the MAGA caucus is looking to expand their ranks, and they've targeted this seat. Show Kevin McCarthy and his extremist backers the strength of our people-powered campaign.= = Oregonians sent me to Washington to get stuff done for working families – expand access to health care, protect social security, take on the climate crisis, and defend our elections. You know: to solve problems facing our community. And every day I'm here, I'm on the front lines of those fights. But if we're going to make real progress, we need to take back the House. That means we need to fight to hold on to every single seat – especially in districts like mine that are on Kevin McCarthy's wishlist. We know his plan: funnel millions of special interest dollars into Oregon to distort my record and prey on people's fears. The negative ads have already started. But we know our plan, too: counter their corporate cash with grassroots power, bring people together, and tell folks the truth. = Val | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for and authorized by Val Hoyle for Congress. | This email was sent by Val Hoyle for Congress PO Box 657 Springfield, OR 97477 United States Email is an important way for Val Hoyle to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. name: JohnFetterman.com
subject: Wish we didn’t have to send this email
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
The truth is we’re falling behind by over $20,000 and we might not hit our goal.
#
Derek,
This isn’t the email we want to be sending with four days left before our FEC deadline. Despite a ton of effort, it looks like we’re falling behind on our goal and we don’t know if we can plausibly catch up.
**Truthfully, we’re a little more than $20,000 behind where we thought we’d be at this point in the quarter**
Occasional slowdowns in fundraising are pretty normal for campaigns, but we were really hoping to reach our goal and start our year as strong as possible. Now, it’s looking unlikely unless we see a big surge soon.
**[Derek, do you think you could chip in for the first time before our big deadline? Any amount would help us close this shortfall — whether you can afford $5, $25, or more.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230326-1?refcode=em20230326-1-8304&refcode2=8304_434096_8qNS-j&akid=8304%2E434096%2E8qNS-j)**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230326-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230326-8304&refcode2=8304_434096_8qNS-j&akid=8304%2E434096%2E8qNS-j)**
No matter what happens when the clock strikes midnight on Thursday, we’re deeply grateful to this team. Thanks to yinz, we’re supporting John’s work with grassroots funding instead of prioritizing mega-donor checks.
Thank you, truly, for being part of this.
💛 Team Fetterman HQ

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20230326-8304-footer&t=1&refcode2=8304_434096_8qNS-j&akid=8304%2E434096%2E8qNS-j)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=2&akid=8304%2E434096%2E8qNS-j)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=8304%2E434096%2E8qNS-j)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

| | **Far-right House Republicans from the Freedom Caucus have gone around party leadership and proposed a new budget**. The House Freedom Caucus boasts some of the most extremist, right-wing members like Matt Gaetz, Marjorie Taylor Greene, and Lauren Boebert. These MAGA Republicans aren't interested in governing or improving the lives of Americans. They continue to do whatever is necessary to impose their extremist and dangerous policies on our country. **Their budget proposal is exactly what we've come to expect from them. In 2017, Republicans blew a $2 trillion hole in the deficit to give a tax handout to corporations and the wealthy. Now they want American families to pay for it by slashing your hard-earned Medicare and Social Security benefits.** **[In a democracy, the government works for the people. Together we have the power to get right-wing extremists out of office. To no one's surprise, their budget plan doesn't include a single line taxing wealthy corporations. And for all Republicans' talk about "fiscal responsibility," – their plan doesn't even reduce the deficit. subject: Here’s who I’m supporting right now

body:

| | | Peter,

Many people have asked me how I choose who I'm supporting, and I want to be clear...

I will only support Republican fighters who understand the Left is actively working to take away our freedoms and usurp more power for the Federal bureaucracy.

Ron Johnson is one of those fighters.

---

---

Senator Ron Johnson is an unapologetic Republican freedom fighter who stood strong against an unbelievable wave of attacks from the Left and the media last year. But he came out ahead thanks to patriots like YOU.

Now, Ron is holding Democrats accountable and demanding answers on issues like COVID-19 vaccines, Chinese Communist Party aggression, and Hunter Biden's business dealings. He's fighting for FREEDOM and the TRUTH, and he needs your help.

name: Ted Cruz
subject: Another reminder from the Left
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Peter,

Joe Biden and Senate Democrats love to remind us how little they care about the safety of America and its citizens.
Our border is STILL wide open and STILL in chaos in 2023.
[
](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62479621:6WWUl9GNv:m:1:3391001263:21E1711C9B8FF5B173AC83D511A85EEA:r)

Under Democrats' watch, _[narco-terrorist cartels have smuggled tons of fentanyl and other dangerous drugs across our border, made BILLIONS from it, and even kidnapped and murdered U.S. citizens without consequence.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62479621:6WWUl9GNv:m:1:3391001263:21E1711C9B8FF5B173AC83D511A85EEA:r)_

The fact is, they've had every possible chance to secure our Southern border and keep Americans safer. **They refuse.**

**Instead, Chuck Schumer would rather speak on the Senate floor about the Democrats ' plan to use government power to silence conservative voters, attack Fox News, and force their rule over Americans who want them voted out of power**.

ENOUGH IS ENOUGH.

Far-Left Democrats only have a TWO-seat advantage in the Senate. In 2024, Conservatives have the best chance __in nearly a decade__ to end it with 3 vulnerable Democrats up for re-election.

[**_That 's why I've selected YOU to join me as a pillar member of the NRSC Battleground States Nominee Fund. Gift a small contribution today to help Senate leadership and me put GOP nominees on offense right away_**** >>**
](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62479621:6WWUl9GNv:m:1:3391001263:21E1711C9B8FF5B173AC83D511A85EEA:r)

Joe Biden and Chuck Schumer are hoping you sit back and abandon Senate Republicans in their hour of need.

If you fail to act, we won't stand a chance against the Left. Restoring our Conservative Senate majority begins with you making a contribution today.

[**_[Put America First - Contribute Now]_**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62479621:6WWUl9GNv:m:1:3391001263:21E1711C9B8FF5B173AC83D511A85EEA:r)
****_****************************_****
To Victory,
****_****************************_********_**************
[
](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62479621:6WWUl9GNv:m:1:3391001263:21E1711C9B8FF5B173AC83D511A85EEA:r)
**************_****
Ted Cruz
U.S. Senator, TX

name: Team Sara (CA-51)
subject: Inside: an update on our progress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
body:
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em?refcode=20230326_em_team_eoq2 [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em?refcode=20230326_em_team_eoq2]
Friends, a quick recap of the past couple days:
First , Sara emailed you ahead of the weekend with a big goal of reaching 400 grassroots donors by our first end-of-quarter deadline of the election cycle.
Then , this team stepped up — big time . Check out our current progress to goal:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/89313/images/SDS/SJJ-316donors.png]
Now , with less than a week to go until this major FEC deadline, we’re asking you to help close the gap and set Sara’s re-election campaign up for success.
Will you chip in today?
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately.
Donate $20 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em?express_lane=true&amount=20&refcode=20230326_em_team_eoq2]
Donate $75 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em?express_lane=true&amount=75&refcode=20230326_em_team_eoq2]
Donate $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=20230326_em_team_eoq2]
Donate other amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em?refcode=20230326_em_team_eoq2]
Look, it’s pretty incredible that 316 people have already decided to give whatever they can to help — we’ve said it before and we’ll say it again: this team is amazing.
And here’s the thing — while the amount we’re able to raise ultimately does matter (a lot), what matters just as much right now is how many people are able to pitch in at all , whether they give $50 or $5.
Because when the FEC publishes its report after the first quarter ends, that “total number of donors” number is a critical one. It shows just how much grassroots support Sara has behind her, and can be a factor in all kinds of other things, from media coverage to future fundraising ability to the opposition field.
It’s not an exaggeration when we say that every grassroots dollar from every donor really makes a difference. With that in mind, please consider making a gift in any amount to help us close the gap on this critical 400-donor goal by the end of the quarter. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em?refcode=20230326_em_team_eoq2]
Thank you so, so much.
-Team Sara

name: Brad Finstad
subject: Our farmers need help.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Finstad for Congress](https://links
body:
What do you think matters most?| | | [](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=0a899ad0193f48d399298a3556652e7c&_m=f8952bcf8b9148deae4008641548b3d3&_e=2B3tRkZMdRxnB7iIe2K1WiiiP8dBhEJ-DpGg_RhLnqezmiTRPkxxEBlqy4ohCHSJus5XNOMS3D-1iQ9rycdm93bLDGvWz8kO3LoQ4Jlbry5ixT4TebmdTCg5_OiNOjT2cRGncsDZ24hFc_zy3pMJEg84d7LoRu5crH04PnDeHnmjTRcEmdTPWDaxB32oiU5BrAWq7ITkv6mPRn4BHNpgKfupxPy4N4Od591LJ4Ap9YfhJzWSwFk3nDX_VYnMSRD_DkmXB7kBi7VMyBHFAAOVxg%3D%3D)
---
I've been traveling across our state to meet with farmers, friend. These hardworking men and women are the backbone of the U.S. agricultural industry, and they're struggling to keep business alive under the insane restrictions being imposed by the federal government. I want to make sure that the 2023 farm bill makes life easier for our hard-working men and women in the fields. As I wrap up my visits with these farmers, I head back to D.C. to stand up for what they need to succeed. **I am curious to see what you think should be addressed.**
---
[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=0a899ad0193f48d399298a3556652e7c&_m=f8952bcf8b9148deae4008641548b3d3&_e=2B3tRkZMdRxnB7iIe2K1WiiiP8dBhEJ-DpGg_RhLnqezmiTRPkxxEBlqy4ohCHSJus5XNOMS3D-1iQ9rycdm93bLDGvWz8kO3LoQ4Jlbry6p2OYZ4Lw_MEwEFmSShivp3jhT1q3Lu8yj_7bhbve6JDrCnOlwoHOpX203vJxPawSpCXDA0ZC3Dzx--u4x42TeaJuKzQNkFxUzPR-6nTHqNwK47u4ElSHtHDrWWafky3rJ-fODqO1YtLwgS6ImuToCS8_gEceL7B6ig540x2IcBA%3D%3D)

[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=0a899ad0193f48d399298a3556652e7c&_m=f8952bcf8b9148deae4008641548b3d3&_e=2B3tRkZMdRxnB7iIe2K1WiiiP8dBhEJ-DpGg_RhLnqezmiTRPkxxEBlqy4ohCHSJus5XNOMS3D-1iQ9rycdm93bLDGvWz8kO3LoQ4Jlbry4uCHJvJisUrsLwzO3itfZxP6UP7uchEQCvJrcJxWEzWoDNQ0qAMYwdMaJDqlnzc_WFLoTH7GRSJVLF7jM3PCl4FN0jdTbvcq5ApmTwG0oqDSj7LEFVrZLtBrSvCVacjS0fIYSRJSGIXSWLaN6iTSCduukHMnZ1y80ncnoClXeCIw%3D%3D)
---
I would really appreciate your opinion as well so I have the whole picture in mind when working on the new farm bill in 2023. **[Let us know your thoughts.](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=0a899ad0193f48d399298a3556652e7c&_m=f8952bcf8b9148deae4008641548b3d3&_e=2B3tRkZMdRxnB7iIe2K1WiiiP8dBhEJ-DpGg_RhLnqezmiTRPkxxEBlqy4ohCHSJus5XNOMS3D-1iQ9rycdm93bLDGvWz8kO3LoQ4Jlbry6VUda0RtlfGEKvEfAxIteBddkUU1xo1D972kEh0RAo7khvAK8sO6SvggqBPRJMzsX1gwzUKS03ZIJ2usdU32UmS-vzL3BY3J60_Odz9SNjvpeRqdsPeZ-VxVip46s3lvFj1uLyySwMKRtceq98cUisa2KnCC3yTH5cISnvnJRPLw%3D%3D)** Thank you,**Brad Finstad**

clean_body: What do you think matters most?| | | I've been traveling across our state to meet with farmers, friend. These hardworking men and women are the backbone of the U.S. agricultural industry, and they're struggling to keep business alive under the insane restrictions being imposed by the federal government. I want to make sure that the 2023 farm bill makes life easier for our hard-working men and women in the fields. As I wrap up my visits with these farmers, I head back to D.C. to stand up for what they need to succeed. I am curious to see what you think should be addressed. I would really appreciate your opinion as well so I have the whole picture in mind when working on the new farm bill in 2023. Thank you,Brad Finstad | | | | | | | | ---|---|---

name: Shift WA
subject: Top News: Democrats' revenue lie
body:
We are just four weeks away from the end of the 2023 legislative session and - despite high crime and public outrage - Democrats have yet to take action and reform their failed and deadly pro-criminal laws passed in 2021. | | [](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61637273:W-CC-HDMN:m:1:2610672541:B3750C6090333ACB29D55DB194D5F967:r "Shift Washington")
---
| Friends,

We are just four weeks away from the end of the 2023 legislative session and - despite high crime and public outrage - Democrats have yet to take action and reform their failed and deadly pro-criminal laws passed in 2021. But as always, we here at Shift WA have you covered with some of this week's most read stories and insights into what is going on in your own political backyard! Read on...

**This week 's Newsmaker Interview...**
State Representative Andrew Barkis (R - Lacey), the ranking Republican on the House Transportation Committee, joined us this week. Rep. Barkis gave his insights on legislation passed by the House of Representatives seeking to increase affordable housing units. He also shared his concern with the governor's plan to have the state recklessly borrow $4 billion for housing projects. Finally, Rep. Barkis expressed his frustration with Democrats for blowing the opportunity to help low-income households through tax cuts. [**Read more**](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61637274:W-CC-HDMN:m:1:2610672541:B3750C6090333ACB29D55DB194D5F967:r)**.**

**This week 's top story...**
Upon the heels of the state's mid-session revenue forecast, liberals from Olympia's legislative halls to Seattle newsrooms revealed just how math-challenged they are when they attempted to explain to the public that record tax collections do not equal any tax refunds for the state's taxpayers. Despite revenue increasing, Democrats and news outlets spun the story using a "did not increase enough" angle. Of course, that gives them the perfect excuse to continue raising taxes for more out-of-control spending. [**Read this story and more**](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61637275:W-CC-HDMN:m:1:2610672541:B3750C6090333ACB29D55DB194D5F967:r)**.**

**In case you missed it ... **
During a townhall meeting in the 36th legislative district, Democrat lawmakers revealed their out-of-touch approach to dealing with skyrocketing crime rates - that is, don't deal with it at all. State Rep. Julia Reed put the blame for public concern over rising crime rates squarely on a "massive misinformation campaign" that is even confusing her fellow progressives. She said, "I see so many of my Democrat colleagues buying into it, and that really has been personally quite painful for me." Her comments followed that of State Senator T'wina Nobles who previously insinuated that people concerned with the rising crime rates are being misled because "fear has been instilled in them from our local law enforcement." [**Read this story and more**](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61637276:W-CC-HDMN:m:1:2610672541:B3750C6090333ACB29D55DB194D5F967:r)**.**

**Your inspiration for the week ...**
With Democrats in control, there's a lot to be concerned about in our state. But we believe it's important to sit back and appreciate the beauty of Washington. Former Congressman Rod Chandler's beautiful photography helps us do just that. Here's a photo of Mount Baker and Conway Church that we're enjoying this week:

P.S. Have you signed up for our Daily Briefing? If not, please take a moment to sign up now by [**clicking here**](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61637277:W-CC-HDMN:m:1:2610672541:B3750C6090333ACB29D55DB194D5F967:r).

Also, tune in to 570 KVI on your AM dial weekday mornings at 8:05, to hear John Carlson talk Washington State legislative politics with Shift co-founder Randy Pepple. Get early insight into what might make Shift's next Daily Briefing worth reading! | [ DONATE ](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61637278:W-CC-HDMN:m:1:2610672541:B3750C6090333ACB29D55DB194D5F967:r)
---
|

If you would like to send this message to some of your friends, you can [click here](http://click.shiftwa.org/forwardthis/ft.php?mID=14166724&em=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&ch=49000b887de404a22f48ed48dd2d4356&schema=echo3) to do so.

You can also stay up to date on our efforts to shift the debate in Washington State by following us on [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/shiftwa/) & [Twitter](https://twitter.com/ShiftWA). If you believe you received this message in error or no longer wish to receive emails from Shift Washington, [click to unsubscribe](http://click.shiftwa.org/p/oW-CC-HDMN).

name: Katie Porter
subject: Cutting the BS
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18914?t=1001&akid=3086%2E346206%2EcRvx3_ ][IMG]

Peter,

Katie Porter here—you may know me as the minivan driving single-mom who
uses a whiteboard to hold corrupt CEOs and incompetent government
officials accountable.

But here’s what you might not know: In January, I announced that I’m
running for the United States Senate. I’m running because Americans
deserve a warrior to fight the battles of tomorrow, stand up to special
interests, and “do Congress” in a way that connects with Americans—many of
whom are disillusioned about whether our government can work for them.

Now we’re 5 days out from our end of quarter fundraising deadline. And
look, CEOs and my teenagers can agree: I’m not one for BS answers. So here
are two quick reasons why I’m asking for your $5 right now.

1. This end of quarter deadline will be the first time our Senate
campaign is required to publicly report how much money we have raised
since launching. A strong number signals that I’m a serious competitor
in this race and can prevent super PACs from attacking me (let’s show
them it’s not worth it!).

2. I’m the only Democrat in this race who has never taken a dime from
corporate PACs, and I reject all contributions from federal lobbyists
and Big Bank, Big Oil, and Big Pharma CEOs. Our average donation is
less than $30, I truly count on supporters like you.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18914?t=1002&akid=3086%2E346206%2EcRvx3_ ]Peter, I really need your help before March 31st. Can you
make a donation that will be split between my campaign and Charles Booker
before Friday at midnight?

CHIP IN →

Thanks so much. I can’t do this without you!

Katie Porter

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20230326-3086-footer&t=1003&refcode2=3086_346206_cRvx3_&akid=3086%2E346206%2EcRvx3_

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=3086%2E346206%2EcRvx3_

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

[**_And I’ll be honest. What I want more than anything for my birthday is your $15 to help Democrats take back the House Majority. >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60762277/398140314/1694452237?refcode=20230326_em_fr_b1_pelosi_30_op&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOGVlMDg3Mi1mM2NiLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yFL4t9HqPQt9j6hH7L7Qy1xMXeCn2JMlfj0TSIOOZws=)

Fellow American -

I'm running on a vision to answer the question of what it means to be an American in the year 2023. Merit. Truth. Free speech. Accountability. I believe deep in my bones these ideals still exist.

I am running for President to **revive** the conservative ideals that put this country into motion 250 years ago, and to create an alternative to the failed, woke leftist policies - not just complain about them.

How do we get this done? _**I challenge every GOP candidate to join me in some easy commitments:**_
1. End affirmative action
2. Abandon the climate cult
3. Total decoupling from China
4. 8-year limits for all federal bureaucrats
5. Say NO to central bank digital currencies
6. Release the "state action" files

Fellow American, Republicans can't be asleep at the wheel any longer, I need you on my team. **[Chip in $1 or more if you agree that our next president should commit to these 6 things!](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=012d30d1a6a94a1eafbf2a7ab1e722bb&_e=Cu2OJPvlzfVvrozIjD2s-spD4uFr1UNRQQ0th0hNBJ3csSiMJ6VAYoa72u-3WF037FaN6qL4GeIZbWwtRCR541sTL4m2Ze7dQ8ocJtMaEqoLDGi4b5GrA38Ll6evjLlHPGHoI97_8j1ny_pVZ0jalqtIlkmmadvw05NDVWQkqWoiugzDkG5o6jb01qY9y9jfyBjMO9P0-VgK0BHkP_giEmj5k1wnSMb_3n5yHPjbmKHA88_1Ycgg1kIg4GPF7lnCK4qjTE_iCQYoHu0F5FxeZz2IviwOxMPQtLlAwHl9Gj4PmxGcaGDdUtRbTEwt2_PUdhjiQ34K-PKels2SEEg69X_SGSO4omoHmbDwayjmfoTa2UTdYVo4BM1WMGiNRSvw)**

---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

It’s absolutely critical that we stay on track.

| Peter,

I launched my campaign to replace Josh Hawley on January 6th because we can’t afford to send another fraud or coward to represent Missouri in the U.S. Senate.

Our campaign is on a mission to give power back to everyday, working people — and we’re building it the right way, with no money from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or Big Oil + Big Pharma executives. That’s why I need your help today:

**Our very first FEC deadline is just around the corner and it’s absolutely critical that we stay on track.**

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Recent bank crashes jeopardized the security of millions of American families, and the damage continues to unfold. Kyrsten Sinema helped crash Silicon Valley Bank and put huge stress on the financial system through support for deregulation … a policy Rep. Ruben Gallego voted to oppose. Gallego is running for Sinema’s seat and we know who we trust more!
body:
Sinema voted for the bank crash
| | | | |

| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. | | | | | Peter, **Who caused the crash of the Silicon Valley Bank (SVB), _the second largest bank crash in U.S. history,_ is simple to figure out.** _One of the biggest causes of this crash_ of the kind that set in motion the Great Depression, _was none other than Kyrsten Sinema. In 2018, when Trump deregulated banks like SVB, he knew where to buy a vote. GOP Senators like Ted Cruz were easy. But, he had a "Democrat" who'd also endanger our economy: Kyrsten Sinema._ [**Will you join us in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to Ruben Gallego? No more SVB crashes caused by greedy politicians**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T61b409f6-53a8-4e06-a57f-76b68adba94c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **Kyrsten Sinema's appalling Senate record is defined by doing whatever banks ask of her, as long as the cash keeps flowing. As Michael Daly wrote, for _The Daily Beast_ : ** [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0b0448ce-9ca2-41e1-a3b8-325dacf98827/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

Meanwhile, Ruben Gallego, veteran, Latino, fighter for choice, gun safety, workers & democracy, voted against that travesty of a bank deregulation bill._** **_Sinema proved she's a danger to our economy. | | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. name: Michael Bennet
subject: yet another reason to rein in Big Tech
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Colorado
body:
The rise of generative AI cannot come at the expense of our children. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60762776/398142490/721416609?refcode=header&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYWM0YmZhNS1mN2NiLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0QD7cTozNiVDr-bXrlrNPwnGwqBKNJF9bG6vmHbHzRY=)
Folks: For nearly twenty years, Big Tech has worked without any regulations — writing their own rules to fulfill their commercial interests, with almost no regard for public safety or wellbeing. The public introduction of AI-powered chatbots and the rush to integrate them into our social media platforms pose a real threat to younger users. **The race to deploy generative AI cannot come at the expense of our children. ** Social media's youngest users are at an earlier stage of cognitive, emotional, and intellectual development, making them more impressionable, impulsive, and less equipped to distinguish fact from fiction. It's not difficult to see the risk of exposing our children to chatbots that have a history of engaging in verbal abuse and suggested self-harm. We’ve seen how these platforms have not only accelerated mental health crises in our children — especially among teenage girls — but how tyrants and extremists of the world have used social media as a powerful tool for mass manipulation. It’s past time to reel in the digital platforms that hold such great power over our health, our economy, and our democracy. [**If you agree, add your name to my petition calling on Congress to regulate Big Tech today:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60762778/398142491/1032644423?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYWM0YmZhNS1mN2NiLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0QD7cTozNiVDr-bXrlrNPwnGwqBKNJF9bG6vmHbHzRY=&emci=9fdb8fc3-32c8-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=2ac4bfa5-f7cb-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=1295540) | **[Add Your Name](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60762781/398142492/1032644423?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYWM0YmZhNS1mN2NiLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0QD7cTozNiVDr-bXrlrNPwnGwqBKNJF9bG6vmHbHzRY=&emci=9fdb8fc3-32c8-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=2ac4bfa5-f7cb-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=1295540)**
---
Last year, I introduced the first-ever legislation in Congress to create an expert federal watchdog for Big Tech to support parents and their children, and create common-sense rules to protect the health and well-being of all Americans.
The Digital Platform Commission Act would create a Federal Digital Platform Commission to regulate digital platforms, protect consumers, promote competition, and defend the public interest, and today, I’d like you to sign on as a citizen co-sponsor.
**What we do to rein in Big Tech now will set the stage to hold these companies accountable for the next 20 years. I’m working on that now, but I need your help to make it happen. **
[**Team, if you agree that our government should place common-sense regulations on Big Tech, add your name next to mine and call on Congress to pass my Digital Platform Commission Act >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60762796/398142495/1032644423?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYWM0YmZhNS1mN2NiLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0QD7cTozNiVDr-bXrlrNPwnGwqBKNJF9bG6vmHbHzRY=&emci=9fdb8fc3-32c8-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=2ac4bfa5-f7cb-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=1295540)
**[SIGN THE PETITION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60762799/398142502/1032644423?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYWM0YmZhNS1mN2NiLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0QD7cTozNiVDr-bXrlrNPwnGwqBKNJF9bG6vmHbHzRY=&emci=9fdb8fc3-32c8-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=2ac4bfa5-f7cb-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=1295540)**

As always, thank you for your support, team,
Michael

clean_body: The rise of generative AI cannot come at the expense of our children. | = Folks: For nearly twenty years, Big Tech has worked without any regulations — writing their own rules to fulfill their commercial interests, with almost no regard for public safety or wellbeing. The public introduction of AI-powered chatbots and the rush to integrate them into our social media platforms pose a real threat to younger users. The race to deploy generative AI cannot come at the expense of our children. Social media's youngest users are at an earlier stage of cognitive, emotional, and intellectual development, making them more impressionable, impulsive, and less equipped to distinguish fact from fiction. It's not difficult to see the risk of exposing our children to chatbots that have a history of engaging in verbal abuse and suggested self-harm. We’ve seen how these platforms have not only accelerated mental health crises in our children — especially among teenage girls — but how tyrants and extremists of the world have used social media as a powerful tool for mass manipulation. It’s past time to reel in the digital platforms that hold such great power over our health, our economy, and our democracy. | Last year, I introduced the first-ever legislation in Congress to create an expert federal watchdog for Big Tech to support parents and their children, and create common-sense rules to protect the health and well-being of all Americans. The Digital Platform Commission Act would create a Federal Digital Platform Commission to regulate digital platforms, protect consumers, promote competition, and defend the public interest, and today, I’d like you to sign on as a citizen co-sponsor. What we do to rein in Big Tech now will set the stage to hold these companies accountable for the next 20 years. I’m working on that now, but I need your help to make it happen. As always, thank you for your support, team, Michael Bennet for Colorado PO Box 3078 Denver, CO 80201 United States | mailto:info@michaelbennet.com | Paid for by Bennet for Colorado By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

name: Team Helen
subject: Less than 36 hours away
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Helen Gym
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-em-mar2023 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-em-mar2023]
FIRST: Helen led a people’s agenda on City Council that expanded the horizons of what’s possible in our city. She restored nurses and counselors to our public schools, spearheaded an eviction diversion program that cut evictions by nearly 70%, and guaranteed predictable schedules for 130,000 hourly workers.

THEN: We jumped into our biggest challenge yet – bringing a bold vision for a safer, thriving, vibrant Philadelphia all the way to the Mayor’s Office. Our team showed up in every neighborhood and talked to Philly voters block by block – mobilizing the strongest grassroots coalition and securing Helen’s spot on the ballot.

NOW: Now we’re in the home stretch of this race to make Philadelphia the best place in the country to live and raise a family. We have a major fundraising reporting deadline in less than 36 hours and we’re $995 away from reaching our $10,000 online contribution goal. Can you pitch in $10 right now before our deadline on Monday at 11:59 p.m.?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your contribution will go through immediately:

CHIP IN $10 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-em-mar2023?express_lane=true&amount=10]
CHIP IN $20.23 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-em-mar2023?express_lane=true&amount=20.23]

CHIP IN $50 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-em-mar2023?express_lane=true&amount=50]
CHIP IN $100 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-em-mar2023?express_lane=true&amount=100]

CHIP IN $250 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-em-mar2023?express_lane=true&amount=250]
ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-em-mar2023]

Let’s do this together.
— Team Helen
Helen Gym is a Philly mom, a school teacher, a community organizer, and former City Councilmember. She has been fighting for Philly families and communities for decades — winning more resources for our schools, safer communities, and a more affordable Philadelphia. Our efforts are supported by everyday people like you who give what they can, whenever they can, because they want to see a safer, more prosperous, equitable Philadelphia that works for all of us. If you’d like to donate to Helen and help elect her as Philadelphia’s next Mayor, click here:
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-em-feb2023]
Friends of Helen Gym
PO Box 11766
Philadelphia, PA 19101
United States

name: Ronny Jackson
subject: I’m sure you’ve gotten a ton of messages about the arrest of President Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Texans for Ronny Jackson
body:
| | **I 'm sure you've gotten a ton of messages about the arrest of President Trump, but this one doesn't require your money, your number, or your email.**
---
This isn't one of those emails.
This is Congressman Ronny Jackson.
I was President Trump's White House physician, and now, I'm proudly his strongest ally in the House.
Listen, I'm sure your email has been blowing up with unsolicited messages about Trump's potential arrest.
I'm sure you've gotten messages from random organizations you've never heard of before.
**And I 'm positive you've gotten emails from Swamp Creature "Republicans" who claim to be on Trump's side, but behind closed doors secretly want him to rot away in a prison cell.**
I get these emails too, but this one is different.
As Trump's top ally in the House, I speak with him often - very, very often.
[**So I asked my team to make a page where President Trump 's top supporters can send him their own personal message as he faces the biggest political Witch Hunt in American history.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62479634:6JqdE9GN1:m:1:3391001263:AF122FB476CC326FCE6A25BE4C64EC2C:r)
And again, this doesn't require your money, your number, or your email.
| [ **SEND A MESSAGE TO TRUMP** ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62479634:6JqdE9GN1:m:1:3391001263:AF122FB476CC326FCE6A25BE4C64EC2C:r)
---
But just a fair warning, **responses will be cut off at midnight tonight.**
My team needs time to organize them before President Trump lands in my home state of Texas for his FIRST rally since announcing his candidacy.
So I'm humbly asking:[ **Please send your message to President Trump today.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62479634:6JqdE9GN1:m:1:3391001263:AF122FB476CC326FCE6A25BE4C64EC2C:r)
I know how much he loves his supporters
Thank you & God Bless,
Ronny Jackson

_-The New York Times_

The earth will cross a critical threshold for global warming by 2030 if we don’t take drastic measures to end our use of fossil fuels, a report from the Intergovernmental Panel on Climate Change shows.

_**Ending the era of fossil fuels should be our highest priority in the fight against the climate crisis!**_

Our window to take action against Big Oil is quickly closing, and we are still far from ending our dependence on planet-warming fossil fuels, but there is still hope. [_**Will you contribute $10 today to demand climate action now before it’s too late?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60764598/398147896/931979156?refcode=BLU-JANE-20230326-1-EM&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjU0ZDAxNGQ2LWZkY2ItZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=oaxYfCGF7nQ7E_OeTIWmugK04WKvvypDHQTcqv4wbrM=)

The Biden Administration’s approval of the Willow project in Alaska should serve as a grave reminder that our leaders are falling short of their promises to phase down fossil fuels.

_**And we will be left to deal with the deadly consequences of climate change if we don’t act now.**_

We need to hold our elected officials accountable for siding with fossil fuel giants and putting _**profit over people.**_ [_**Will you contribute $10 today to help us hold our elected officials accountable and end the reign of the fossil fuel industry?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60764600/398147898/931979156?refcode=BLU-JANE-20230326-1-EM&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjU0ZDAxNGQ2LWZkY2ItZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=oaxYfCGF7nQ7E_OeTIWmugK04WKvvypDHQTcqv4wbrM=)

name: Ro Khanna
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ro for Congress
body:
I’m proud to announce that I’m endorsing Representative Barbara Lee for the US Senate and will serve as co-chair of her campaign.
#
Friend,
Over the past few months, it’s been an honor to hear from supporters across California who have reached out and encouraged me to run for US Senate next year.
While I’m truly grateful for their support, I love representing Silicon Valley in the House and will not enter the race for the California Senate seat.
Instead, I’m proud to announce that **I’m endorsing Representative Barbara Lee for the US Senate and will serve as co-chair of her campaign.**
[**Will you chip in and help Barbara Lee become California’s next senator?**](https://act.rokhanna.com/go/11315?t=8&akid=2664%2E946728%2EGuzDcx)
[****](https://act.rokhanna.com/go/11315?t=9&akid=2664%2E946728%2EGuzDcx)
Barbara is the progressive leader Californians need right now. And her solid record as one of Congress’ most outspoken [champions of justice](https://act.rokhanna.com/go/11316?t=10&akid=2664%2E946728%2EGuzDcx) speaks for itself.
Barbara isn’t just an exceptional legislator; she’s also a personal hero. Her lone vote against the war in Afghanistan 20 years ago is one of the most courageous acts of modern time, and it inspired me to first run for Congress at age 27 on an anti-war platform.
I also believe that representation matters. The United States, as Frederick Douglass said in 1867, is a composite nation. But for far too long, our country’s institutions have failed to reflect that reality. Black women are the core of the Democratic Party, yet there isn’t a single Black woman currently serving in the Senate.
We can finally change that.
[**Donate now to help make history and send Barbara Lee to the Senate!**](https://act.rokhanna.com/go/11315?t=11&akid=2664%2E946728%2EGuzDcx)
Building a multiracial, multicultural democracy is hard work, and we must be willing to fight for it. I look forward to fighting alongside Barbara Lee. I hope I can count on you as well.
In solidarity,
Ro

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ro-em-footer?refcode=em20230326-2664-footer&t=12&refcode2=2664_946728_GuzDcx&akid=2664%2E946728%2EGuzDcx)**
---
[](https://facebook.com/RoKhannaUSA) | [](https://twitter.com/RoKhanna)
Email us: [info@rokhanna.com](mailto: info@rokhanna.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Ro for Congress, PO Box 3513, Santa Clara, CA 95051.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.rokhanna.com/signup/fewer_emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.rokhanna.com/signup/update-your-information/?t=13&akid=2664%2E946728%2EGuzDcx)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.rokhanna.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=14&akid=2664%2E946728%2EGuzDcx)

name: Jon Tester
subject: our first public fundraising deadline
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
Mitch McConnell is looking for weakness
#
Peter, in just a moment **[I’ll ask you to make a contribution to my campaign before our first public fundraising deadline,](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60764980/398148879/1603134752?refcode=dd_em_230326_1_t1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMDE1N2YwNy0wMGNjLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pfb3NuH2aOw-nYGs9lEYWzew_35ONdKP8xmd-75mkrI=)** but first I hope you’ll give me a moment to explain why it’s so important to give — especially today.
**I’m the most vulnerable Senator up for reelection in 2024** and Republicans have already named me as a top target. Mitch McConnell and his super PAC allies will throw everything they’ve got at me to try to flip my seat red — they’ve already started spending money on attack ads against me.
On top of that, our first end-of-quarter FEC deadline is in 5 days. This will be the first time our fundraising numbers will go public since announcing my official reelection campaign.
It’s a BIG deal. Mitch McConnell and our potential Republican opponents will get to see just how strong (or vulnerable) our campaign is. If McConnell finds any weaknesses in our report, he’ll think Montana is ripe for the taking. **The GOP only needs to flip TWO seats to retake the Senate majority, and they’re laser focused on Montana.**
Let’s be clear: This election isn’t a sure thing. Experts say this race is a toss-up and rank Montana as one of the seats most likely to flip red. That’s why it’s SO important you make a contribution today — everything is on the line.
**[Will you split a contribution between Senator Durbin’s and my campaign today? We need to raise another $15,325 by the 31st to reach our FEC end-of-quarter goal. clean_body: Mitch McConnell is looking for weakness Peter, in just a moment = but first I hope you’ll give me a moment to explain why it’s so important to give — especially today. I’m the most vulnerable Senator up for reelection in 2024 and Republicans have already named me as a top target. Mitch McConnell and his super PAC allies will throw everything they’ve got at me to try to flip my seat red — they’ve already started spending money on attack ads against me. On top of that, our first end-of-quarter FEC deadline is in 5 days. This will be the first time our fundraising numbers will go public since announcing my official reelection campaign. It’s a BIG deal. Mitch McConnell and our potential Republican opponents will get to see just how strong (or vulnerable) our campaign is. If McConnell finds any weaknesses in our report, he’ll think Montana is ripe for the taking. The GOP only needs to flip TWO seats to retake the Senate majority, and they’re laser focused on Montana. Let’s be clear: This election isn’t a sure thing. Experts say this race is a toss-up and rank Montana as one of the seats most likely to flip red. That’s why it’s SO important you make a contribution today — everything is on the line. = We’ve won tough battles before, and I’m confident we’ll do it again. Thanks for sticking with me. — Jon Tester ** **** ****=**** Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin

body:
You can learn a lot about a person from the company they keep — and for right-wing Wisconsin Supreme Court Justice candidate Daniel Kelly, none of it is good. | | | Peter, You can learn a lot about a person from the company they keep — and for right-wing Wisconsin Supreme Court Justice candidate Daniel Kelly, none of it is good. **Last week, Kelly appeared at an event headlined by a pastor who has called the murder of an abortion provider “justifiable homicide.”** The _Milwaukee Journal Sentinel_ also reports that at the event, the pastor “advocated for the creation of anti-abortion-focused militia and compared coronavirus pandemic-related mask mandates to the Holocaust.”1 **We cannot allow someone who associates with violent extremists to become the next Wisconsin Supreme Court Justice.** That's why we need to elect Judge Janet Protasiewicz, who has pledged to protect our freedoms, stop a far-right takeover, and bring integrity back into the courtroom. **[Can you pitch in to fuel our work in the last nine days of this election and help elect candidates who will fight for abortion rights?](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zfh-ljwx9RuYYFFGz5HiYU7KvpbeqQBuYQD8uFxWTTK6qLo79ZJQ8KX7vHuMTpLXEH6q56U-6kDWDg7CD2KolliprBPdKpit31tZI5z86sQW92F7j4p1nR8f_jWPdDSvt4Us6z-uEz8RcMYB_wbvq3hRHNQocvLYWa53o3Kvj-JiKcmN6joDscQYrAP0E589qw8CUpyMSxO7NUY2YlF96STP-iSxtrQxZsTO6Lue5WrBxBScLpzOwpSRY_BdKaX-s5l-jyhRaXp9POux7HX4IHF0emDXkX7XDJwMn3t0quGCnyHK6kKaAXcTLqBWE8vtVQVvL-7pbQDXPljAKX8dqcj4c1TKaUSsJi9bfY-IzwVg/3ut/Q6geSufoRnuyWxtun-fEOg/h0/b_p8hDldnL6onVyX8oemw-5nB2GAolqYxJQTe8H_6_s)** This is not the first time we’ve seen radical power-hungry Republicans show up for Daniel Kelly. **His campaign is being supported by anti-abortion groups, people who planned and participated in the January 6 insurrection, the NRA, the Wisconsin Fraternal Order of Police, and more.** And there’s a reason why. His own career is full of unconscionable work, including for an organization that supports banning abortion with no exceptions for rape or incest2 and with the Wisconsin Republican Party and the RNC on a plot to steal the election for Donald Trump by enlisting fake electors.3 **Whoever wins the ten-year term to the Wisconsin Supreme Court — a court which issued more 4-3 decisions in their last term than any other in the last 70 years 4 — could be the deciding vote on abortion access, the freedom to vote, gerrymandering, election integrity, and so much more.** On April 4, just nine days away, we need to beat Daniel Kelly and elect Janet Protasiewicz to the bench. **[Pitch in to help reach voters in the final days about why this election is so important, and to build the progressive infrastructure we need in order to keep on fighting for abortion rights.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zfh-ljwx9RuYYFFGz5HiYU7KvpbeqQBuYQD8uFxWTTK6qLo79ZJQ8KX7vHuMTpLXEH6q56U-6kDWDg7CD2KollHKK_jXE7ejEdxGJGlSbY-tLe6kdyTRo9iSYhFRF4XDNgU1Ag9iYeOeV1WGxAln6yBcYwtuMtMA5wzbyB33gOqIS9psGnjNQvRbiMNk0qRTq5rPhmg39T-b4bhmmjI_C2x2l1fhU0mbn-pGCTmHaQXahTFr2SW_ljpYDavymIcO_zqpkjz9IrMNdFH8zXQpZbebpop-xx41xra0f4K_mBmexoBqVvCKHbjsKmLwfQkHiHcGLF_dJXb3DkTAM6puchSojsKTL-_U-MHnM20doWGA/3ut/Q6geSufoRnuyWxtun-fEOg/h2/L3necxhyrsR5YdxOH2GXBuEvjVuNAs3jIZ5Xo_HzMcc)** **[Contribute $10 »](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zfh-ljwx9RuYYFFGz5HiYU7KvpbeqQBuYQD8uFxWTTK6qLo79ZJQ8KX7vHuMTpLXEH6q56U-6kDWDg7CD2Kollb9XcJDVZRLsmUxsjzjscAPqskua3R2mTPbAJ94RebiJsENs77bkbCFdwTmdV9Jhug6NOSLsZqR0BsZwFgOOOb33GZArJkOSTDyYD0HQucxZF-Gzr0__24QIQn3a_PZ2ky8QWl0WMmXvqj8d54a-8KYwnRGjC5dCWVkBuVOTI5tupdA6M3IQ-M5TcCRiYd6tY21LYOhyoXJVzhj7VfOGLSHfXZ_jw2AVW04Ar0OvqLYItZ2xnBmVuiOlJv-yQBTu3E6SpS0gZnWYOpbndFze5FA/3ut/Q6geSufoRnuyWxtun-fEOg/h3/HHs3wfgXEJMSya4pJ5nHlMcl64C0hKM18TQ7DEz1Bh4)** In solidarity, Working Families Party Sources:

clean_body: You can learn a lot about a person from the company they keep — and for right-wing Wisconsin Supreme Court Justice candidate Daniel Kelly, none of it is good. | | | Peter, You can learn a lot about a person from the company they keep — and for right-wing Wisconsin Supreme Court Justice candidate Daniel Kelly, none of it is good. Last week, Kelly appeared at an event headlined by a pastor who has called the murder of an abortion provider “justifiable homicide.” The Milwaukee Journal Sentinel also reports that at the event, the pastor “advocated for the creation of anti-abortion-focused militia and compared coronavirus pandemic-related mask mandates to the Holocaust.”1 We cannot allow someone who associates with violent extremists to become the next Wisconsin Supreme Court Justice. That's why we need to elect Judge Janet Protasiewicz, who has pledged to protect our freedoms, stop a far-right takeover, and bring integrity back into the courtroom. This is not the first time we’ve seen radical power-hungry Republicans show up for Daniel Kelly. His campaign is being supported by anti-abortion groups, people who planned and participated in the January 6 insurrection, the NRA, the Wisconsin Fraternal Order of Police, and more. And there’s a reason why. His own career is full of unconscionable work, including for an organization that supports banning abortion with no exceptions for rape or incest2 and with the Wisconsin Republican Party and the RNC on a plot to steal the election for Donald Trump by enlisting fake electors.3 Whoever wins the ten-year term to the Wisconsin Supreme Court — a court which issued more 4-3 decisions in their last term than any other in the last 70 years 4 — could be the deciding vote on abortion access, the freedom to vote, gerrymandering, election integrity, and so much more. On April 4, just nine days away, we need to beat Daniel Kelly and elect Janet Protasiewicz to the bench. In solidarity, Working Families Party Sources: 1\. , Milwaukee Journal Sentinel, March 23, 2023 2\. , Wisconsin Examiner, March 13, 2023 3\. , Milwaukee Journal Sentinel, February 17, 2023 4\. , Wisconsin Public Radio, June 7, 2022 Thoughts? There are only a few spots left on the list in Englewood, FL, so please don't delay in joining. clean_body: still haven't heard anything | We're so close to being victorious, Peter. We all heard that President Trump was going to be arrested. Tuesday came around, then Wednesday, and now, still NOTHING. The Left is scared. They know that millions of Americans see through their lies and are fed up with the political persecution. We need to be loud. We need to be angry. We can't sit around and accept this manipulation any longer. We're asking you right now, **can you show the Radical Left that their witch hunt won 't be accepted? | Don't let this set a precedent for conservatives in the future. Without holding the Left accountable for this failure, we'll all be in trouble. Thank you, Justice Alerts via Team Vance Conservative Outsider. Marine. Businessman. Author. Ohio needs a true conservative in the U.S. Senate. It needs someone who understands how our economic and government leaders conspire to make life harder for normal Americans. Ohio needs JD Vance. name: Kevin McCarthy
subject: This is NOT a threat to be taken lightly.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
| |
---
| | | **Democrats in the Senate have introduced legislation to make Washington DC a state and they 're seeing OVERWHELMING SUPPORT.**

This is NOT a threat to be taken lightly. DC is a FAR LEFT stronghold. Should it become a state, it would PERMANENTLY give Democrats two more far left Senators that they could use to transform America BEYOND RECOGNITION.

**The following Democrats are in FULL SUPPORT:**

---

The Democrats are in FULL CONTROL of the Senate and the White House. Chuck Schumer wants this to happen. Joe Biden wants this to happen.

A Republican House is the LAST line of defense.

Democrats know they can't win with standard tactics so they're making a power play by trying to flip the game board to their advantage!

It is IMPERATIVE that we stop this radical power grab right here and now. If the Dems get away with this, NOTHING. ELSE. MATTERS.

**[Will you join your fellow patriots and House Republicans in taking a stand against DC Statehood and this blatant Dem scheme for power?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62479652:6BQMo9GNM:m:1:3391001263:C4CD0A1F5A47AB816727EB16586581C8:r "Will you join

Kevin McCarthy

* * *

[](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w5O3Wwmdygae0W-34efSvb_hfX51xtIkq_nCgr0tl8iRqUTOndcJRC4vm20WcsKLik7V_4qROaJVRrvAYICwKrFN-5LbKvs0wmanG8Sc1O-DIgcvz4ihEh7TiYAE28Z6BA7E-8Jy41Dqfv3waEDUjLBMlfwW9J6aqErmccI-uknxMDmsK-mndvBq50tWeqWYpK8F0naAmZ9JqyRscQNTlISIaPOIuQiE_ypUhIRtBbNmctgPmG_ry-vlrdHd5GMjZ26z94KQ49rRJ-k2SgF2sOP3czCIyqy2h4I2EUiMTKy3q_aU4JtJVo9esF4qv2SNInUDxlPoLPkHCaXS39Y9QERoDS-az4vDHEeuo34MxNcVC0FzeM305WOWsA6LXIFV8/3ut/U9E0Cd2wQGO3lGl1GVqgLQ/h11/hbaF5i-v6XiBFSBtSwPzV06qz-svcvltnbZhp_W5eLQ) The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. clean_body: | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | | PETER: WE’RE RAPIDLY APPROACHING OUR FIRST FUNDRAISING DEADLINE OF THE YEAR AND WE NEED YOUR HELP TO MEET OUR $25K GOAL. | Peter, this is the state of our country after we failed to hold the House: Abortion rights are under attack across the country. Extreme MAGA Republicans like MTG are in key committee appointments — even serving as Speaker Pro Tempore. LGBTQ+ communities are being persecuted more than we’ve EVER seen. THIS IS THE MOMENT WHERE WE HAVE TO STEP UP. We’ve helped elect HUNDREDS of Black progressive champions at all levels of political office and we’ve got BIG plans to double our efforts this cycle – but that starts with reaching this week’s fundraising goal. If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | | | | | | — The Collective PAC The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people. subject: Fwd: How can we expect kids to pay attention in class, learn, and succeed if they’re hungry? We can’t.

body:
Hey Derek, we really wanted to make sure you saw this:

Hey Derek, we really wanted to make sure you saw this:

Governor Josh Shapiro just announced a plan that would provide every public school student in Pennsylvania free breakfast. This would be a gamechanger for so many kids – and we need all hands on deck to make it happen.

**[If you believe no kid should go to school hungry, sign your name to support Josh Shapiro’s universal school breakfast plan >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60783679/398172181/-662387369?utm_campaign=email_032623_school-breakfast-kicker&source=email_032623_school-breakfast-kicker&refcode=email_032623_school-breakfast-kicker&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOTcwMWNmNy0yOGNjLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M8ETxP3cr9fGGo6D_ghlOR5pdNJY1nLuFz7Ky645RwQ=&emci=9e2b0a5d-e9cb-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=b9701cf7-28cc-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=21962291)**

\- Team Shapiro

Begin Forwarded Message:

Derek, Governor Josh Shapiro just proposed something huge:

**Universal free breakfast for every student in Pennsylvania’s public schools.**

In a Commonwealth as well-resourced as ours, no kid should go hungry. But the reality is: they are. And we must change that now.

**If you believe no child should go hungry, sign your name to support Josh Shapiro’s universal school breakfast plan →** | | [SIGN YOUR NAME →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60783680/398172182/-662387369?utm_campaign=email_032623_school-breakfast-kicker&source=email_032623_school-breakfast-kicker&refcode=email_032623_school-breakfast-kicker&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOTcwMWNmNy0yOGNjLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M8ETxP3cr9fGGo6D_ghlOR5pdNJY1nLuFz7Ky645RwQ=&emci=9e2b0a5d-e9cb-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=b9701cf7-28cc-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=21962291)

How can we expect kids to pay attention in class, learn, and succeed if they haven’t eaten all day?

_We can’t._

That's why Josh Shapiro wants to provide free breakfast to every child in our public schools. His plan will provide universal free breakfast for 1.7 million Pennsylvania kids — and will cover the full cost of lunch for 22,000 Pennsylvania kids who are currently eligible for reduced-price lunches.

**Every kid should have access to a healthy and nutritious meal. If you agree, sign your name to support Josh Shapiro’s groundbreaking universal breakfast plan for Pennsylvania:**

**[https://action.joshshapiro.org/a/school-breakfast](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60783681/398172183/-662387369?utm_campaign=email_032623_school-breakfast-kicker&source=email_032623_school-breakfast-kicker&refcode=email_032623_school-breakfast-kicker&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOTcwMWNmNy0yOGNjLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M8ETxP3cr9fGGo6D_ghlOR5pdNJY1nLuFz7Ky645RwQ=&emci=9e2b0a5d-e9cb-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=b9701cf7-28cc-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=21962291)**

Team Shapiro

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GABE VASQUEZ FOR CONGRESS
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60773905/398154402/-218325884?refcode=fl_email_fr_20230326eoq2_gv_180da_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OTFmOTI2Ni0wOGNjLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y1ZhNk6LBMOXgem0h8C-f9iZRVLvUwEgJPa4mLxZSzo=)
---
Hey team, **[I’m reaching out today to ask if you can pitch in a grassroots donation of $10 or more before Friday’s FEC fundraising deadline.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60773906/398154403/-218325884?refcode=fl_email_fr_20230326eoq2_gv_180da_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OTFmOTI2Ni0wOGNjLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y1ZhNk6LBMOXgem0h8C-f9iZRVLvUwEgJPa4mLxZSzo=) **But before I do, let me explain just why this deadline is so important. At the end of every financial quarter, campaigns like ours have to submit all of our fundraising information to the Federal Elections Commission (FEC), which will then go public for anyone to see. Some of the key metrics from this report include the total amount raised, total number of grassroots donors, and our average contribution (which, right now, is about $20). _Why do those numbers matter?_ Because they show the people-power behind our campaign. I ran for Congress and won because of grassroots supporters like you instead of dark money from Super PACs. The amount we raise will also determine how much we can start spending on advertising, mailers, and events as we prepare for the most competitive 2024 House election in the country. **I was just named a DCCC Frontline Member and an NRCC Top-Target this month, so we need to build our resources ASAP to defend this seat from the far-right and flip the House blue.** **[Right now, we’re still $4,763 away from reaching our end-of-quarter goal before our midnight deadline on March 31. Can you chip in $10 or whatever you can afford right now to support me and our campaign for NM-02?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60773907/398154404/-218325884?refcode=fl_email_fr_20230326eoq2_gv_180da_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OTFmOTI2Ni0wOGNjLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y1ZhNk6LBMOXgem0h8C-f9iZRVLvUwEgJPa4mLxZSzo=)** | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
